name: Doug Mastriano
subject: The 2020 Pennsylvania Audit has begun!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO | DOUG MASTRIANO IS HONORABLY RETIRED
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)
---
Peter,
---
I have officially initiated the process for a forensic investigation of the Pennsylvania 2020 election.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)
---
[Source: Associated Press]
---
_I have already requested information from counties across Pennsylvania with a deadline to comply by July 31._
---
_As a citizen of the freest nation in the world, YOU have a RIGHT to know that our elections are honest and fair -- and I promise to fight to uncover the truth about the 2020 election for you._
---
[**Please make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916043:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916044:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916045:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916046:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916047:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)**
---
From last-minute rule changes that accommodated ballots received after 8 p.m. on election night 2020, to hundreds of sworn affidavits alleging fraud, _you have every reason to be suspicious about the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania._
---
All I'm asking for is a transparent and thorough investigation to prove to U.S. voters that our votes were fairly counted, and that we have nothing to worry about.
---
But according to Democrats, that's too much to ask. Everyone on the Left is attacking me for initiating this audit.
---
Even the _Associated Press_ called me an "ultra-conservative."
---
If fighting for the integrity of your vote makes me an "ultra-conservative," then so be it. But I prefer the term _American._
---
I trust you know that I will not stop fighting to deliver transparency and security to our elections. But at this critical moment, I'll need you to stand by my side.
---
[**So please, make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57916042:6UeEDalN3:m:1:3253819041:3ED9E39B58E01380D40039FB28CF06B0:r)
---
Senator Doug Mastriano
---

---
Friends of Doug Mastriano | P.O. Box 138 Fayetteville, PA 17222

name: Roy Cooper
subject: SIGN ON: Tell the legislature to invest in a clean energy future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It’s undeniable: Climate change is making natural disasters harsher and more frequent. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32273540/295231750/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBhZjU5NC0xZGUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5ge7geTfYXPeqlZ8dW2wXM7ZAB5Jy6kFhO7iJ9E9p8=&emci=41ad7ea9-16e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7b0af594-1de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, I was born and raised in North Carolina. I’ve seen it all in this state — hurricanes, tornadoes, floods, you name it. **And one thing is undeniable: Climate change is making these natural disasters harsher and more frequent.** **Peter, we need to protect North Carolina for future generations.** We _must_ address climate change before it’s too late. That’s why, as governor, I’ve made investing in clean energy a priority in my administration. Now, we need our legislature to follow our lead and invest in a clean energy future. [**Take a minute to sign our petition asking Republican legislators to set partisanship aside and get to work protecting our environment through clean energy investments >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32273541/295231751/20436177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBhZjU5NC0xZGUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5ge7geTfYXPeqlZ8dW2wXM7ZAB5Jy6kFhO7iJ9E9p8=&emci=41ad7ea9-16e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7b0af594-1de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176) | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32273542/295231752/20436177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBhZjU5NC0xZGUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5ge7geTfYXPeqlZ8dW2wXM7ZAB5Jy6kFhO7iJ9E9p8=&emci=41ad7ea9-16e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7b0af594-1de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
---
Expanding renewable energy will grow our economy while helping to secure our planet against climate change — but we’re running out of time to make a real difference.
For years, experts have told us that we need to take real action by 2030 to prevent irreversible climate change. _**Just nine years.**_
It’s up to every one of us. We can’t risk running out of time to protect our planet for future generations.
**[You can help by signing our petition right now to ask the legislature to join with our administration and support advancements in clean energy. Click here to add your name>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32273543/295231753/20436177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBhZjU5NC0xZGUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5ge7geTfYXPeqlZ8dW2wXM7ZAB5Jy6kFhO7iJ9E9p8=&emci=41ad7ea9-16e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7b0af594-1de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)**
Thank you,
Roy

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Defund Critical Race Theory?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. Agree or disagree? _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUeIGadCN)****_ | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)
---

Peter,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country's past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we've learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they're going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

{{#if [FirstName]}}{{[FirstName]}}{{else}}Fellow American{{/if}}, it's critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation's largest teacher's union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: {{email}}

Response Deadline: Monday, July 12th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It's "_e pluribus unum_ " - out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Peter, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It's so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)**.

Thank you,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58424788:WUeIGadCN:m:1:2247059263:71ABD8A6FA1DB0C7167F9B4304CDA6A6:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan for housing
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
For many families, home ownership is an important anchor of generational wealth as a family’s most valuable asset, and can also be an important marker of financial independence and stability that many young people strive to achieve. Yet, home ownership has become increasingly out of reach for far too many of our fellow Marylanders -- and those who don’t wish to become homeowners may also contend with exploitative rental practices and soaring costs of rent.
This situation is unsustainable for our working families -- which is why as your next Governor, I’m going to take a bold approach to facilitating greater access to home ownership so that more people can capture the value of the money they spend on housing.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/dG1A_pENEECQnaItzttJcw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dG1A_pENEECQnaItzttJcw2]As part of my plan, I’m going to introduce a program that offers the State of Maryland as a guarantor of mortgages in target communities. The goal of this program will be to create parity across race and zip code for new home ownership rates by 2030.
If you want to help more Marylanders afford to become homeowners, then will you sign on to my plan to utilize housing as a vehicle for wealth and stability? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dG1A_pENEECQnaItzttJcw2]
I’ll also combat exploitative rental practices by piloting an eviction diversion program that expands on the right to counsel, and support an affirmative defense against eviction for tenants who can prove any substantial loss of income like recent unemployment.
Additionally, I’m going to end the blight of vacant properties. I’ll provide target areas like Baltimore City with resources to more aggressively acquire and rehabilitate vacant properties, to be resold or reused for affordable housing via community land trusts.
In 2022, we have the opportunity to help working families expand their wealth through reforms that facilitate greater access to home ownership. I hope I can count on your support in this effort. Click here to sign on to my plan to utilize housing as a vehicle for wealth and stability. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dG1A_pENEECQnaItzttJcw2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em071221]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a5d15158-95de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/0b4429d7-21e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ0MjlkNy0yMWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f4eGw6fjRNFzNGEuBuCyXlBugStiapGGlGdn9OusXfU=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

body:
5 reasons

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32276160/295243044/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTkwZWJlZC0yM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MW8bsD3kaHTRVb28yDnLvQ328cyPy21WXkKukqvik9o=)

| | Team, We know we email you a lot asking you for money. But hear us out: today we’re going to give you 5 specific reasons why we think you should support Susie Lee’s campaign — and then _you can decide for yourself how much those reasons mean to you._
1. Republicans only need to flip 5 seats in the House to secure a majority, and after Susie Lee won by such a narrow margin in 2020, **National Republicans have their eyes set on NV-03 as a potential blue-to-red district.**

2. Susie Lee is working to fight for _**critical issues**_ like protecting women's reproductive rights, supporting small businesses, and ensuring COVID-19 relief. **We need to keep Susie in the House so she can continue working on legislation that will help all Americans.**

3. Susie Lee already has **4 GOP opponents** vying for her seat, and they’re not pulling any punches. Susie needs to have the resources to be able to fight back!

4. Despite all the progress we’ve made toward recovering from this pandemic, there is still so much more to do. **We need leaders like Susie Lee at the helm** so we can get people vaccinated, and so we can deliver relief to families and small businesses.

5. Susie Lee is a problem-solver and she knows Nevada. There are a lot of uncertainties in our country right now, but one thing you can be certain of is that **Susie Lee will go to work every day to fight for _you._**

**_[So, did we convince you? If any of these reasons spoke to you, chip in whatever amount feels right — today — so we can stay in this fight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32276161/295243047/-2054270566?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210712_FR_5REASONS_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTkwZWJlZC0yM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MW8bsD3kaHTRVb28yDnLvQ328cyPy21WXkKukqvik9o=)_** | | | [Chip in $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32276162/295243048/-2054270566?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210712_FR_5REASONS_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTkwZWJlZC0yM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MW8bsD3kaHTRVb28yDnLvQ328cyPy21WXkKukqvik9o=)

clean_body: 5 reasons | = | | Team, We know we email you a lot asking you for money. But hear us out: today we’re going to give you 5 specific reasons why we think you should support Susie Lee’s campaign — and then you can decide for yourself how much those reasons mean to you. 1. Republicans only need to flip 5 seats in the House to secure a majority, and after Susie Lee won by such a narrow margin in 2020, National Republicans have their eyes set on NV-03 as a potential blue-to-red district. 2. Susie Lee is working to fight for critical issues like protecting women's reproductive rights, supporting small businesses, and ensuring COVID-19 relief. We need to keep Susie in the House so she can continue working on legislation that will help all Americans. 3. Susie Lee already has 4 GOP opponents vying for her seat, and they’re not pulling any punches. Susie needs to have the resources to be able to fight back! 4. Despite all the progress we’ve made toward recovering from this pandemic, there is still so much more to do. We need leaders like Susie Lee at the helm so we can get people vaccinated, and so we can deliver relief to families and small businesses. 5. Susie Lee is a problem-solver and she knows Nevada. There are a lot of uncertainties in our country right now, but one thing you can be certain of is that Susie Lee will go to work every day to fight for you. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading, Team Susie | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

name: Congressman Mo Brooks
subject: Democrats won't admit this is racist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO
body:
Dear Peter -- Critical race theory is a toxic, racist stew that
Socialist Democrats use to brainwash our children to divide and
hate each other based on skin pigmentation.
This Marxist ideology is a disease that's
infecting how our children think based on their race, rather than
on their character or conduct.

These Socialists want to tell our children
how to feel, act, and believe. As a father and a grandfather, I
say NO to critical race theory.
I'm Mo Brooks and I'm running for U.S. Senate
in Alabama to slam the brakes on the Socialist Democrats'
dictatorial policies, and that means I will lead the fight to BAN
critical race theory.
Donald Trump endorsed my campaign because
President Trump knows he can count on me in this fight.
That's why I'm asking that if you agree with
Donald Trump that Alabama needs a Senator that will fight to ban
critical race theory, I hope you'll agree to chip in $10, $25,
$50, $100 -- whatever you can most afford.
Make no mistake, critical race theory is a
plague spreading in schools across the country, the federal
bureaucracy, and even the military, where Socialist Democrats
hope to upend freedom, liberty, and the American way of life.
Critical race theory cheerleaders have only
one goal in mind - spreading Marxism across our great nation.
This evil ideology schemes to pit students
against one another and indoctrinate them into hating their
country based on lies about race.
And it needs to stop. Immediately.
Taking a stand in this fight won't make me
popular in Washington.
And right now, the establishment, Never
Trump, Never Trump RINOS, and the rest of the Surrender Caucus
are lining up big money to support a professional lobbyist to run
against me.
So I hope I can count on your help right
away. Donald Trump's called for an end to critical race theory in
American schools.
If the voters send me to the U.S. Senate, I
will fight with every ounce of my strength to purge our schools
of Marxists who are brainwashing children through critical race
theory.
In backroom deals, the establishment, Never
Trump, Never Trump RINOS, and the rest of the Surrender Caucus
are lining up big money to support a professional lobbyist to run
against me.
That's why I'm asking you to help the one
candidate in this race endorsed by Donald Trump with an emergency
contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or if you can
afford it, the legal maximum of $2,900 per person.
Talk to you soon,

Congressman Mo Brooks (R-AL)

PAID FOR BY THE MO
BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: How to fix our public schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
School choice. Break the unions. |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ec0eedb3cf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

For too long, the teacher's unions have been dictating to parents how their kids should be taught.

The result? Large numbers of kids not performing at grade level. Arrogant teacher's unions trying to justify teaching racist Critical Race Theory as young as kindergarten.

I am an educator- a substitute teacher in Polk County. I see the issues and I know how to fix this mess.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=eac9284f2f&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who takes money hand over fist from the corrupt teacher's unions that are trying to push CRT on our kids.**

It didn't used to be this way. Our schools didn't used to be this nonfunctional.

When teacher's unions were beholden to the Left and empowered with dictatorial control over education, everything went awry.

Faced with massive public outcry about the teaching of racism in the form of race essentialism, the teacher's unions are...defending teaching racism?

_In prepared remarks obtained by The Associated Press, American Federation of Teachers president Randi Weingarten said her union is preparing litigation and has a legal defense fund “ready to go.”

In an interview, Weingarten said the union is adding $2.5 million to an existing legal defense fund in anticipation of local fights over the teaching of race. The funding will be used to defend teachers who are disciplined for teaching about slavery and racism, Weingarten said. The union is also considering filing lawsuits to get clarification about new state laws limiting how racism can be discussed in schools, she said.

The nation’s other major teachers union, the National Education Association, recently issued its own call for an honest teaching of the nation’s racial histories. At the union’s national meeting last week, president Becky Pringle urged teachers to prepare students for a society that “has wrestled with the sins of its past” and learned from them.

“If this grand experiment in democracy is to succeed, if the inhabitants of our nation are to prosper, we must continuously do the work to challenge ourselves and others to dismantle the racist interconnected systems, and the economic injustices that have perpetuated systemic inequities,” Pringle said._

**That's right, the teacher's unions feel so emboldened by the Biden Administration that they are spending millions to fight the parents in the communities they are supposed to SERVE!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=64e2ca1d64&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**What we need is choice. The unions derive their power from monopoly. Let's take their monopoly away.**__

What we need is school choice. We need to give parents the ability to choose how to educate their children- home schooling, charter schools, public schools, parochial or religious schools.

**By giving parents choice over how to educate their kids, using their own tax money, we are putting the power in the hands of parents, instead of Communist extremists who masquerade as teachers. **

Biden gets everything wrong. He thinks sucking up to teachers unions and giving them dictatorial power will help education.

But we know better.

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, including school choice. I will bring Florida's successes to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _He is terrified of me, and doesn't want to see me again! I can build off my success and win this right!

[This is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=738079cc28&e=afa21b7626)_

The Dems must go! [Help me make schools teach again!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6970385456&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c25596fb3e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b5025699d4&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3489a0253d&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

In prepared remarks obtained by The Associated Press, American Federation of Teachers president Randi Weingarten said her union is preparing litigation and has a legal defense fund “ready to go.” In an interview, Weingarten said the union is adding $2.5 million to an existing legal defense fund in anticipation of local fights over the teaching of race. The funding will be used to defend teachers who are disciplined for teaching about slavery and racism, Weingarten said. The union is also considering filing lawsuits to get clarification about new state laws limiting how racism can be discussed in schools, she said. The nation’s other major teachers union, the National Education Association, recently issued its own call for an honest teaching of the nation’s racial histories. At the union’s national meeting last week, president Becky Pringle urged teachers to prepare students for a society that “has wrestled with the sins of its past” and learned from them. “If this grand experiment in democracy is to succeed, if the inhabitants of our nation are to prosper, we must continuously do the work to challenge ourselves and others to dismantle the racist interconnected systems, and the economic injustices that have perpetuated systemic inequities,” Pringle said. That's right, the teacher's unions feel so emboldened by the Biden Administration that they are spending millions to fight the parents in the communities they are supposed to SERVE! | | What we need is choice. The unions derive their power from monopoly. Let's take their monopoly away. What we need is school choice. We need to give parents the ability to choose how to educate their children- home schooling, charter schools, public schools, parochial or religious schools. By giving parents choice over how to educate their kids, using their own tax money, we are putting the power in the hands of parents, instead of Communist extremists who masquerade as teachers. Biden gets everything wrong. He thinks sucking up to teachers unions and giving them dictatorial power will help education. But we know better. Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, including school choice. I will bring Florida's successes to Capitol Hill! I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. He is terrified of me, and doesn't want to see me again! I can build off my success and win this right! The Dems must go! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Hundreds of Supporters Turn Out to See Eric Greitens with Giuliani, Other National High-Profile Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Hundreds of Fired Up Supporters Turn Out to See Eric Greitens with Rudy Giuliani, Several National, High-Profile Conservatives
---
| ROBERTSVILLE, MO.-- On Saturday, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani, former NYPD commissioner Bernie Kerik, and Veterans for Trump 2020 Co-Chair Jessie Jane Duff joined former Missouri Governor and US Navy SEAL Eric Greitens for a campaign rally in rural Franklin County.
As the Associated Press reported, "several national, high-profile conservatives" turned out to hundreds of fervent supporters of Greitens.
The Gateway Pundit reported that "Greitens was exceptional and reminded the crowd that he was the only Missouri politician to visit the Arizona Audit in Phoenix last month. The crowd cheered the news. This was an exceptional event for the pro-Trump Missouri candidate. Greitens will be hard to stop in the Missouri race."
[READ: HUNDREDS Turn Out to See Eric Greitens with Rudy Giuliani, Bernard Kerik and Jessie Jane Duff in Robertsville, MO](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DMs9gwR3QFaZ5raFXT0yQ26OjY87yZ3mw51ld09xAmjvCc9WSLLglfGbYCaN-xWu3HL3xMAsyBWC2W3_S1TuRtGAFxfRLEMQtoWRvrXOyLnztmXrBOolnHcND7ZoUKCuSzd-rkjhzynmOk_E0WZZ6eNrDnpsSgWUAHC6QdNFO7_t023CyMNq5QZgdkidWtZWrpf5ewzTlrdYsOWf9cLWviDXufwx_1OaXcGATZsk5jKIL4RVzbRMmJ32wGJtTloR-Ax_c5N2fkeAdCdeLEDVgpZx1v3V8-lc3kNaCR853mq9MsLILMMLc__XHhHYJ8RZzi3vVpS-PBPAcgi4vMjc8hP6qLtcNbggtCt4l2cQeyc4oc2MpvOYgDqPf3_Nhkw9liCJMUSiMM2nr48rb52fzxqUzLvJiTa-Q3HEJ6VmVhzRnjFdZlz63A==&c=qczjeCj_ZtsYnqhhCUO5jKh0SXGe3zTEUFAmV6t0_mbJja6iSOXVqA==&ch=j7ahbLpdp_pngDaNBiXBjVECXHPEXEcP9TVMewrJaFV5M0kRm0B3xg==)
Featured speakers also included several of the Missouri's top conservative talk radio stars including Jamie Allman and Marc Cox.
EMissourian.com affirmed Eric Greitens as the clear front-runner for the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Missouri.
[READ: Greitens seen as likely front-runner in U.S. Senate race](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DMs9gwR3QFaZ5raFXT0yQ26OjY87yZ3mw51ld09xAmjvCc9WSLLglfGbYCaN-xWuTYCqDl_KGYKnDA3VdNuQqZw-GSoYGRlmnqqxOv4QN5KEtyVeJwrc1VZMEIei5HsVVKsFeHAOUlkLQuhSDaGdQq7MGY1GYc2Fz-aR0zTIwPfuG5g_MJsrRQTWqZxnUWoBp9rfYOVH1DAgiEkrfTLgg9Ilur5ukUyKPms87_NXzZUnlzF8i7L8ke6_Ij6AEPZNpkjbNe4ikjppIqUY7K1LE3P_TDnTu-iQx7bWwFs9B_R01yIgkyqdLg==&c=qczjeCj_ZtsYnqhhCUO5jKh0SXGe3zTEUFAmV6t0_mbJja6iSOXVqA==&ch=j7ahbLpdp_pngDaNBiXBjVECXHPEXEcP9TVMewrJaFV5M0kRm0B3xg==)
Debbie Neuner, of Villa Ridge said although she is currently undecided, she sees Greitens as the clear front-runner in the race.
Chris Null, of Jefferson County said he didn't know the other candidates running.
"Who are the other candidates? I don't know them," Null said, adding that he will only vote for a candidate who he feels mostly aligns with former President Trump's political priorities related to the economy. On Saturday, he said he felt like that candidate was Greitens.
Some voters, like Gale Griffith-Frolos, who drove with two friends from northeast Missouri to be at the rally, said their support of Greitens was solidified by his words on Saturday.
"He is fighting for us, so this morning, I woke up and decided that I should be here to support him. ... His fight is for the American dream," Griffith-Frolos, a former bank executive, said. "He is fighting for the American dream for all of us and our children."
Griffith-Frolos told reporters that "when Greitens ran for statewide office, he told us what he was going to do, and then he went and did it once he was elected."
Polling from President Trump's pollster show Greitens leading the Republican field by over 40 percentage points.

As the Associated Press reported, "several national, high-profile conservatives" turned out to hundreds of fervent supporters of Greitens. The Gateway Pundit reported that "Greitens was exceptional and reminded the crowd that he was the only Missouri politician to visit the Arizona Audit in Phoenix last month. The crowd cheered the news. This was an exceptional event for the pro-Trump Missouri candidate. Greitens will be hard to stop in the Missouri race." == Featured speakers also included several of the Missouri's top conservative talk radio stars including Jamie Allman and Marc Cox. EMissourian.com affirmed Eric Greitens as the clear front-runner for the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Missouri. == Debbie Neuner, of Villa Ridge said although she is currently undecided, she sees Greitens as the clear front-runner in the race. Chris Null, of Jefferson County said he didn't know the other candidates running. "Who are the other candidates? I don't know them," Null said, adding that he will only vote for a candidate who he feels mostly aligns with former President Trump's political priorities related to the economy. On Saturday, he said he felt like that candidate was Greitens. Some voters, like Gale Griffith-Frolos, who drove with two friends from northeast Missouri to be at the rally, said their support of Greitens was solidified by his words on Saturday. "He is fighting for us, so this morning, I woke up and decided that I should be here to support him. ... His fight is for the American dream," Griffith-Frolos, a former bank executive, said. "He is fighting for the American dream for all of us and our children." Griffith-Frolos told reporters that "when Greitens ran for statewide office, he told us what he was going to do, and then he went and did it once he was elected." Polling from President Trump's pollster show Greitens leading the Republican field by over 40 percentage points. | | ### | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

Friend,

Critical Race Theory is becoming more prevalent in our schools, polluting our childrens' minds with Marxist ideology. Students are being indoctrinated to believe that racism is ingrained in every aspect of American society. **Just this past week, the ACLU of Wisconsin****[sent a letter](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425721:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r)****to all school district administrators, stating that they are obligated to instruct students about race.** What is the end goal of this agenda? To dismantle and recreate all American institutions.

**_Critical Race Theory only serves to divide Americans and teach our children racism by seeking out and promoting racial tension.
_**
Republicans in the Legislature are taking a stand against indoctrination in schools. A [newly proposed bill](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425722:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r) would require school districts to make their curriculum public. This allows parents to make an informed decision about where to send their kids with course material openly available. [Previously proposed legislation](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425723:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r) would restrict teaching of race stereotyping or bias in schools.

**We know that Evers is going to block any attempt to prevent our kids from being indoctrinated with their race-based Marxist takeover of education.** You can join us in the fight against Critical Race Theory by signing up to volunteer [here](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425724:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r), or reach out to your [local county party](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425725:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r) directly. If you don't have time to volunteer, but would like to contribute financially to fund our efforts, [click here](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58425720:sXbv-adjN:m:1:2068296031:F1324D2CF71665ACF622D4C247A2B98F:r).

Thanks,

Team WisGOP

Climate change is here, and we need to act.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32282250/295268546/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210712ajp_n_lc_90do_6_ng_testb_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3MWRjZS0zNmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_TvM18kXMl5epf83mtsjeX0UnMfflXggNDq4W9X-SQ=) Friend, President Biden has proposed the American Jobs Plan, and now it’s up to Congress to get it over the finish line. The American Jobs Plan contains a historic investment in infrastructure that will create _millions of good-paying, clean energy jobs_. As we rebuild our economy after this global pandemic, there is no better time to become the world leader in clean energy. This plan would be a gamechanger for young people. We sent President Biden and many of our Congress members to Washington by turning out in 2020. And now, it’s time to make sure we keep these allies accountable for passing real climate change solutions like the American Jobs Plan. With supporters like you, we need to increase the pressure and think even further ahead. The next three years are an opportunity to make unprecedented investments to combat the climate crisis and transition to a 100 percent clean energy future.
The American Jobs Plan will establish a new Civilian Climate Corps to restore public lands, improve our climate resilience, implement a national clean energy standard to get us 100% carbon-free power by 2035, and more. [**_Help NextGen keep up the momentum and fight for clean energy allies by donating today._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32282258/295268554/1597426347?refcode=em_fr_210712ajp_n_lc_90do_6_ng_testb_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ3MWRjZS0zNmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_TvM18kXMl5epf83mtsjeX0UnMfflXggNDq4W9X-SQ=)
Thank you,
Lillie Catlin

The American Jobs Plan will establish a new Civilian Climate Corps to restore public lands, improve our climate resilience, implement a national clean energy standard to get us 100% carbon-free power by 2035, and more. = Thank you, Lillie Catlin National Program Director NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

* He said he’s considering running for president in 2024 if Republicans win the House Majority
* He’s urging Republicans to reclaim the Senate, too -- including endorsing Florida’s Marco Rubio

name: PACT
subject: Teachers unions have declared war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57919849:6a1nXalbN:m:1:3253819041:A7640B7CD9E2FCD414907FD77525BC90:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57919849:6a1nXalbN:m:1:3253819041:A7640B7CD9E2FCD414907FD77525BC90:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57919849:6a1nXalbN:m:1:3253819041:A7640B7CD9E2FCD414907FD77525BC90:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57919849:6a1nXalbN:m:1:3253819041:A7640B7CD9E2FCD414907FD77525BC90:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57919849:6a1nXalbN:m:1:3253819041:A7640B7CD9E2FCD414907FD77525BC90:r)**

| | Folks, Virginia’s measure to legalize marijuana is officially in effect! This historic step will help boost our state’s economy as we recover from the pandemic and take necessary action to combat clear racial disparities in our legal system -- an ACLU report found that Virginia ranked 7th in the nation amongst racial disparities for marijuana possession. But we can’t stop with the Commonwealth -- millions of Americans and veterans could benefit from being able to access marijuana as one of the only forms of treatment helpful for a range of conditions from PTSD to anxiety, depression, and painful symptoms caused by chemotherapy. That’s why Elaine co-sponsored and helped pass legislation to make cannabis accessible for medical research purposes and to decriminalize marijuana at the federal level -- an important step towards getting people the care they need. **We want to hear what you think:[Do you support Elaine’s efforts to decriminalize marijuana at the federal level?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32283257/295272086/-1255591995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYzMjJmZi0zYWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmBxmave1PXuVHvbHp9qvTilo9p2GqkRJFmrGOTU0qo=&emci=6cd10551-c6e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a6322ff-3ae3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963)** | | | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32283260/295272089/-1255591995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYzMjJmZi0zYWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmBxmave1PXuVHvbHp9qvTilo9p2GqkRJFmrGOTU0qo=&emci=6cd10551-c6e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a6322ff-3ae3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963)

name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c281%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6wHT2Jb5%2flJ9FV3QEpzL0A&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4956%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AvaggzkpkvH1tJ0CNX%2btQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn’t let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven’t already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don’t need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We’ve gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4957%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sJBtBIw1%2bVBEgum2uEOykw&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4958%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2OBAgEZW5cQ4UsuNMu7tQ&sysid=1)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is “Donald Trump said today ... !” “Congress just passed ... “ “Biden will promise ... “ At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that’s why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV’s rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media’s pro-government, anti-business bias.**

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4959%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ix2Vb7WK037Ya3k8AMtkpQ&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4958%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2OBAgEZW5cQ4UsuNMu7tQ&sysid=1)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4950%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F1%2ba7mLv6XrH3X9fVYecfw&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4956%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AvaggzkpkvH1tJ0CNX%2btQ&sysid=1)
John Stossel
Journalist - _Stossel TV_
Center for Independent Thought

Paid for by Center for Independent Thought

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c281%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6wHT2Jb5%2flJ9FV3QEpzL0A&sysid=1)_

I need you from the very beginning – as a Founding Donor – to help me defeat Marco Rubio. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIdg3iu7fvNzS7W4IbLTOIlBBvNiInRXxUr9E0Zh_pit2mpXUiZDfmCi7cy3WGghMzH_emFVC822kCMXXF7FVgjqfqh5kacOndtd9VAX4-jGLRFNAg3tuen1NZNrWQyM4p5MMq3bBBox94ndowEadrQbDZ36oUFxdOeS1g5WSVvccEHZYGBVMU8wnJQPkgEgS6eOYnwty3ecI62QjjalbFxe4lMxtl7mWof-dlzg8osXEUALB-Mjqm13tZOl19pHd67XHF1Q9ShJRG9piH0fCNjY6oPUdlLSSY-kJ_N0GM_9H/3dj/u1C_wRpvRc6yW2LOX5LSGA/h0/L0_8MvCGRsEBndcQUTdOdeQPAcUvCTgP9MGiMzcTaFA)
Derek, I just announced I'm running for the U.S. Senate against Marco Rubio. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip – **and with Senate control on the line, everybody from Mitch McConnell to Donald Trump to far-right outside groups will do whatever it takes to defeat me.** That's why I'm making an important ask of you – one that will determine whether our campaign comes out of the gate as strong as possible: **[Will you become a Founding Donor to this campaign by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Common Good and my campaign today? Every dollar you give will ensure we have the resources, from the very beginning, to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIdg3iu7fvNzS7W4IbLTOIlCJEwr0BrjzMeslixejajuKaMV2q4ApfMUSgh-PJ9HjnlA3vmly7Uxi_n0rYFxGxuKlHW7cBn9ye5CMF112Gx9Mge78IcHyxSBsdkXvGsoKxxMOQ75Z_b7LS7xiWo_6loiwMwQ-0R8BzfRy0xJDvT6V-WPYGWQtPV2HMwihKYMq3Zq3f0r-8hcqCoqTORPhqMDARsQOKOHH5wNG36F87-edBsBSRSlIyYP-wk8Y13r3gtJxlRtvcD6E2-VYGdkSoMpbERsPMzp9scyZydwwlpA7/3dj/u1C_wRpvRc6yW2LOX5LSGA/h1/xK14uPW1-9RqCAJvIORVb_2zwNg8Hjf7leLf9ZJZdaI)** There's no need to beat around the bush, Derek: Defeating Marco Rubio is going to be tough. He will have tens of millions of dollars in right-wing, special-interest money on his side. The GOP will attack me relentlessly to keep this seat red, because Senate control could come down to what we do in Florida. **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIdg3iu7fvNzS7W4IbLTOIlCE1qheRZvqXtodTq7xXOEHpzoioxcmDd586OgC3piNn_1UHrLVH0LNCJUKhMwwkJtsLUY4Ac18erRh6AC_n_ZNHyrjU887PHUpvg3v8iNltrv1CcjH-kQALKzthE8BpHq7eIEG0shXofibSsbYGa506fcCGYXmqvFAWgmDP4B3qNqhZQLJlmEWF8F1NCDReAXGnIWq4zkdf7G6yop9dz7U8x41-qE1N7ShqLuBzA9u8cOB04du31pkK_MwW2n8-r5jk-EPBMewn5wBOjvWDJXm/3dj/u1C_wRpvRc6yW2LOX5LSGA/h2/ph-NYtGO1IgunVAJ2zUgA1aYW-VJTVSForRCX383QJ4)** **Keep this number in mind: 10,033.** That's the number of votes that decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of just two-tenths of a percentage point. That's about as slim as margins come, so I need you to hear me when I say this: Our ability to register and mobilize voters – our ability to _win –_ hinges on the resources we're able to build up from day one. It's how we won in Georgia and took back the Senate. It's how Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the White House. And it's how we'll flip Florida blue and protect our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering the bold agenda that the American people deserve. **[I need you with me, Derek. I need you from the very beginning – as a Founding Donor – to help me defeat Marco Rubio. Will you step up and join us now? Split a donation of $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good to become a Founding Donor right now so we can flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIdg3iu7fvNzS7W4IbLTOIlC97Wfrhg4l-lu45NbvF0HqHAgpMINtHXvssEezR_-6CcaSTXnCGSknCo9w48M_MSLbnrn_L0d9YB1PnqLCz40DlRv21QELRp8HXS5VhBy8oS1EAlJEydJcmr2qKkiv0mcWPvRxoYvJU7X5VT3grC3WG1rxV9WFKnqZQcHHQA4rPv1EdVi2HhL8WyGC112kyfcbdR7ZiQJhCO1mTbxN4hi8ZUn6cH5SIohK_H7d6AqvFynqcaLgnnIMA9H5hZUOv5vszTKPEo_ZawUlUZTzA_ED/3dj/u1C_wRpvRc6yW2LOX5LSGA/h3/VG9cBxK1hpxZmfy3IB2QswlhPfJaC-QgO3W1WIMJQlA)** Thank you, Congresswoman Val Demings

subject: Fwd: It’s time to take matters into our own hands

body:
It’s time for conservatives to step up. You saw this, right?

Harold just launched his campaign a few months ago and he’s already coming up with better policies than a whole lot of the folks in Washington.

We’ve got to get the word out about his immigration plan.

Will you share his video on social media to help make it happen? Here’s the link: [https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=867732714092078](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=36a516b7ff0341c2af8dfae9c1e9dce6&_e=-fpQLozefrYaYwajU91OaULBwgp16DBg7JT0m_rnLfmxV2HDN9HlEfexL4oBR3Kjb6_Ax3Ix0YSVR0_jQJNLt8GWBdKH1JC4nw--wNUibwkJPFTb7PyqRzaqBUCkrjwSe3NJ_iNboMOmEYM-yNeSRSLrwDobvNukQgSt1rErCGmUHbZHgsHv3nGOQIEa-DwoNxa1Hew_LpcAbT3bJKLqJylK-b9aGSncmndLgoM5JN6iovC2yvv1MJAvaOjTE_WLPZuH0xykYPzEz798sqtAHVe2e2E-mpGG8iPIdfmhI4rQAccEFs9f5Q9nddqen78TcG0fiNJBUu8RiSlWJQB6g1Dms-jjG3FwNi-yG3KsWuIB4EKUvy8VmHX3iAlbPCp1XHRI8wEzUKzpXtXNBtDxFoaSJPjLp5bnw7iVnFbmMjQjch16zxxXrRZUxwYZarT3uwdI3fh4tOfgYRcW12qKZit0nsOSpgq-KfZJPcA5JuI%3D)

From: Harold Earls
Date: Thurs, July 9, 2021 at 10:41 AM
Subject: It’s time to take matters into our own hands | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=36a516b7ff0341c2af8dfae9c1e9dce6&_e=-fpQLozefrYaYwajU91OaULBwgp16DBg7JT0m_rnLflVia1wHO8xJwh9wiuSIs7ZoB7Aa19zWvRYwEXjp4bYJlptLsvef6NozVzt_N-u3XQWwz9jRYyH6JLLSqvToKldRIIE5fKJaWrFt6kYOqDSbgnN9JIodZueFiMcwR8xRIKQ7jFEN52red34KlmWaI5grsCwZRPgCzJnvuHx8wBh-6SVtQXr1hQSg0b2phS-FVlHTZL88bp_Dpc6m01DAkufh-Au1mGVc4JceQPgmH-6HpLrV_4rUeaX_qdZk2h6ku0vmfksDJAXk65fLLQpZXkeT8daiAhHZNIT4CThyPTIOzJk4Z9yttSXp_g--QoO7d_oU6cPp6Mw4l6vOQNuVnwMsGVrwSgCtSLswKRQHyGQD0floBENav7vu-2DQtgKzh3N19gxnTPOkY6hqAj7prAs8iqbWD-5IE2luxtb80eHc-_d2qmMNbV9mNNDEMnj7nXmlmKgMxddzt4tIEDCcE4d)
|
---
Hey Nancy,

Washington Dems are failing American families.

Their open border policies are costing us a fortune and threatening the safety of our communities. What’s worse, they’ve seen how bad things are at our border, and they REFUSE to clean up their own mess.

**If Kamala and Joe won’t secure our borders, then we are going to have to find a way to do it ourselves. **

And Nancy, I came up with a plan to do just that. Let me introduce to you the ‘Real SOB with the Government Act.’
|
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=36a516b7ff0341c2af8dfae9c1e9dce6&_e=-fpQLozefrYaYwajU91OaULBwgp16DBg7JT0m_rnLflVia1wHO8xJwh9wiuSIs7ZoB7Aa19zWvRYwEXjp4bYJlptLsvef6NozVzt_N-u3XQWwz9jRYyH6JLLSqvToKldRIIE5fKJaWrFt6kYOqDSbgnN9JIodZueFiMcwR8xRIKQ7jFEN52red34KlmWaI5grsCwZRPgCzJnvuHx8wBh-6SVtQXr1hQSg0b2phS-FVlHTZL88bp_Dpc6m01DAkufh-Au1mGVc4JceQPgmH-6HpLrV_4rUeaX_qdZk2h6ku3spImIz45UrroeXi97gSO27UJwWxrvaIvziSHiRSM3icSLIBpA2JnWgmB1X8-Mlmxf0y9eh4xrm__vyBu7bOC_2M509nk5BOuy9eHwnaa5tgBTu2pOppZPXXoM3avDOXbOvplNLwO8KFyzWJHczSezByx9OVnxFKtZ8u_J64oGH3bozC4R9U066DTjNasYWiuakkJILnzQGSeiQJHeAqz3)
|
---
American families NEED a solution that will fix our border crisis. I think my proposed policy is that solution. Now, we just need to find a Member of Congress to sponsor it.

_That’s exactly why I’m reaching out to you, Nancy._

I’m trying to get the word out about my plan to fix the border crisis, but I need your help.

**Can I count on you to share this video and help me spread the word?**
|
---
[**SHARE THE VIDEO**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=36a516b7ff0341c2af8dfae9c1e9dce6&_e=-fpQLozefrYaYwajU91OaULBwgp16DBg7JT0m_rnLflVia1wHO8xJwh9wiuSIs7ZoB7Aa19zWvRYwEXjp4bYJlptLsvef6NozVzt_N-u3XQWwz9jRYyH6JLLSqvToKldRIIE5fKJaWrFt6kYOqDSbgnN9JIodZueFiMcwR8xRIKQ7jFEN52red34KlmWaI5grsCwZRPgCzJnvuHx8wBh-6SVtQXr1hQSg0b2phS-FVlHTZL88bp_Dpc6m01DAkufh-Au1mGVc4JceQPgmH-6HpLrV_4rUeaX_qdZk2h6ku1pv55j8ArDlEcWOp4d0PGj9B2JkU9Wp55ZMJMocNecP56Yaa-WgBhKinbhrlqxltS9fCWyjnMPfvG3zAqY0Q100VXCATE5putGpxHkcZ0Ft0s6VioF1UwYW0dYP1Y9CcOCC6ju8jlnBQh8zEH5wU4zVEHB87xgneYiR_k5z1hQIDnZfJkebzjZaA3CbRmlTtu0cRkrUYOrQaQtd0bQ5ZSQ)
|

Kamala and Joe aren’t keeping our families safe, so it’s time we do something about it.

In freedom,
Harold Earls
---
|
---
Harold Earls is a husband, a father, and a 9th generation Georgian. He knows that good ol' boy politics are dragging our state backward and leaving our families behind. That's why he's launching a grassroots movement to create a new generation of conservative leadership in Georgia. Chip in today to help him make it happen.

name: John McGuigan
subject: Q: How do you get the GOP to care about you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32284788/295276844/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjU4NmQwOS0zZmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3v4Ly0yQPRLFyk4jq3R7242eee0RR4-WGhYEdy7p8wA=&emci=398a94c4-30e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3f586d09-3fe3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)
---

| | A: Change your name to "Corporation." It would be funny if it weren't so true. **Corporate welfare takes our hard-earned money, and gives it to corporations and fat cat executives who use it, all too often, to fund stock buybacks or just use it to slowly kill our planet.** Bold claim I know, but let's look at facts. Take Big Oil. Robert Reich, writing for _The American Prospect_ not long ago, makes an _excellent_ point: Every year, oil companies get to deduct millions of dollars from their tax bills for the cost of new wells, oil exploration, and other drilling and mining expenses. [**Deductions for the costs of drilling wells** , Location in tax code: 26 U.S.C. § 263(c) ;**Domestic manufacturing deduction for oil and gas production** , 26 U.S.C. § 199, **Deductions for the depletion of oil and gas deposits** , 26 U.S.C. § 613A(c)(1)] It's been estimated that repealing these special tax breaks would save taxpayers **$39 billion over 10 years.** Can we stop and think about how stupid it is to give tax breaks for "domestic" oil production? A 6% reduction in taxes, when by _definition_ the oil is here!! That's a _lot_ cozier than just a "helping" hand, Peter. Those three tax breaks alone would get us 40% of the increase for a higher cost of living adjustment in Social Security, or a good start towards free college, or for family leave for everyone--you know things that benefit **people**. The stuff the GOP won't even let us talk about in the Senate. The Senate can't even debate raising the minimum wage, but ExxonMobile CEO D. W. Woods can make $23.5 Million in compensation, 135 times the median salary of his employees, and the equivalent of 753 people making $15/hr. **If a corporation like ExxonMobile can afford to pay 1 man $23.5 million dollars a year, in addition to whatever other benefits he is reaping, they sure as hell don't need these tax breaks. They are nothing but welfare for the wealthy.** **[I am asking for your support so we can bring this conversation to the highest levels of our government, with an eye to making substantial changes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32284789/295276845/-34735242?refcode=2021-07-12-corporate-welfare&recurring=0&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3f586d09-3fe3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjU4NmQwOS0zZmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3v4Ly0yQPRLFyk4jq3R7242eee0RR4-WGhYEdy7p8wA=)** It's not going to be an easy road. But this is an important fight, one we must win. And we won't make changes unless we take aggressive action. _Onward,_ _John_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32284790/295276846/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2021-07-12-corporate-welfare&refcode2=3f586d09-3fe3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjU4NmQwOS0zZmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3v4Ly0yQPRLFyk4jq3R7242eee0RR4-WGhYEdy7p8wA=) clean_body: | | | A: Change your name to "Corporation." It would be funny if it weren't so true. Corporate welfare takes our hard-earned money, and gives it to corporations and fat cat executives who use it, all too often, to fund stock buybacks or just use it to slowly kill our planet. Bold claim I know, but let's look at facts. Take Big Oil. Robert Reich, writing for The American Prospect not long ago, makes an excellent point: Every year, oil companies get to deduct millions of dollars from their tax bills for the cost of new wells, oil exploration, and other drilling and mining expenses. [Deductions for the costs of drilling wells , Location in tax code: 26 U.S.C. § 263(c) ;Domestic manufacturing deduction for oil and gas production , 26 U.S.C. § 199, Deductions for the depletion of oil and gas deposits , 26 U.S.C. § 613A(c)(1)] It's been estimated that repealing these special tax breaks would save taxpayers $39 billion over 10 years. Can we stop and think about how stupid it is to give tax breaks for "domestic" oil production? A 6% reduction in taxes, when by definition the oil is here!! That's a lot cozier than just a "helping" hand, Peter. Those three tax breaks alone would get us 40% of the increase for a higher cost of living adjustment in Social Security, or a good start towards free college, or for family leave for everyone--you know things that benefit people. The stuff the GOP won't even let us talk about in the Senate. The Senate can't even debate raising the minimum wage, but ExxonMobile CEO D. W. Woods can make $23.5 Million in compensation, 135 times the median salary of his employees, and the equivalent of 753 people making $15/hr. If a corporation like ExxonMobile can afford to pay 1 man $23.5 million dollars a year, in addition to whatever other benefits he is reaping, they sure as hell don't need these tax breaks. They are nothing but welfare for the wealthy. = It's not going to be an easy road. But this is an important fight, one we must win. And we won't make changes unless we take aggressive action. name: Rand Paul
subject: re: the Delta Variant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920443:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r) | |
---
Peter, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don't want to let go!

That's probably why we're hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ "delta variant."

**Don 't let the fear mongers win. New public England study of delta variant shows 44 deaths out of 53,822 (.08%) in the unvaccinated group.**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, and more useless rules.

If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920444:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920445:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920446:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920447:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Peter, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat. EVER.

We cannot allow our country to be shut down and our businesses destroyed over an illness most healthy individuals will recover from.

No matter what "variant" they're trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype.

I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, Peter.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57920443:6hfsFalbN:m:1:3253819041:3802AAB43D1D97DFC37AE6785D0E05C1:r)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Josh Shapiro is trying to shut it down.
| Peter,
---
Just minutes after I initiated the forensic audit of the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania, George Soros' handpicked attorney general, Josh Shapiro, said he's going to try and __shut it down__.
---
**_What do they have to hide?_**
---
Shapiro is the likely Democrat nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania and will try to make shutting down my audit a key part of his campaign.
---

body:
---
| | Union workers at Hufcor Manufacturing in Janesville are fighting for their livelihoods right now. Why? Because a private equity firm decided to move 200 jobs from Janesville to Mexico.

Last month, Tom joined the workers in Janesville and spoke at a rally to show solidarity:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32289020/295293885/-1182394101?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210712_1_1&refcode2=4c557122-4de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzU1NzEyMi00ZGUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_6OSMs018qqXhmVGmY6i_CaWDbLrw2PxFD-Dm28kaI=&emci=4b557122-4de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4c557122-4de3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
What’s happening in Janesville is not just about the workers at Hufcor. It affects the community and the families that call Janesville home.

Here’s the thing, many large corporations and private equity firms will continue to choose profits over people unless we stand up and fight back. Tom’s been on the side of workers and been pro-union his entire career. _As you know, he even wrote a book about successfully standing up to Wall Street and saving a paper mill._

[At this point, you know where Tom stands. His presence at the rally last month makes that abundantly clear. But, we’re asking you to stand with the workers in Janesville. clean_body: | | Union workers at Hufcor Manufacturing in Janesville are fighting for their livelihoods right now. Why? Because a private equity firm decided to move 200 jobs from Janesville to Mexico. Last month, Tom joined the workers in Janesville and spoke at a rally to show solidarity: What’s happening in Janesville is not just about the workers at Hufcor. It affects the community and the families that call Janesville home. Here’s the thing, many large corporations and private equity firms will continue to choose profits over people unless we stand up and fight back. Tom’s been on the side of workers and been pro-union his entire career. As you know, he even wrote a book about successfully standing up to Wall Street and saving a paper mill. | | Thank you for standing with workers, Nelson for Senate | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

| | | Hi Friend, Who was last week’s biggest jerk? Meet the nominees, and then cast your vote below. **And the nominees are...**

* Donald Trump, who reminded us again [why he’s a jerk](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3d5a43f-8747-4fd3-9d1d-05e1d859078f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* All the idiots who want to vote for him [again](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d4b0a35-16c5-478b-ad11-5cf13fdf2e80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

**Cast your vote by clicking on your choice below: **

We’ll post the winner on our [Facebook page](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70cda46d-a06b-4616-ac55-b90618a0e8fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) later this week!

body:
Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dG6whwQexrXFPi9ggleLuH7VknFMUx3mN54krIa9EgrMfa1UIFWi6CFjvJd8aFDmuSfiLcv_9GXDU2X9u5v0T7p63twHDKGgnywDEbiVd21yOAePVaRz9QKWfzmcOZUKjdzTnI95TKz5lMSwmq4Jll5ebVqJSfe8h21D55kNLZxJqXvD_160o-s463OSTfs55Mo71KYPPRHzRGyoLP_z3nfQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, _let me tell you why._

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. [**I will need your support after I expose the truth about BLM, so please consider pitching in just $5 or $10 after you read my message.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dG8Jsx4FT-59FALeNSsf55JKi-7gjdZJh0xa8rh7LhIzRI3-N1MVWXiZAyIuaPYnY35XFLm98wtd1NUzzQ1bDz-6912Afl8mUiVbfyUa9-ibwHGIibXABpfT3QkUnYXWpoQ_z0wnjxGclhhZxs198UmjHsrPuYp_xvWoY_M0-J2dgxHcnai24-AYsR3xf5Y-ssXF9pI4Vo913xim-mJJziRg%3D%3D)

[**STAND UP TO BLM
ELECT A BLACK PATRIOT -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGqY8LHNOy3JmLgsYOR_dSpEQyB3wIxhS9WBFnJe9aMIjm98CH6pj-UCzqmlvP6GamW0FE1hPXu0hwajkxeJZFYyE9DsNO1syzyWessj3zDoGh8wh9Ci7L9e0dI4iQHjUpzN8OTE4jafNLmewdo3FG4Olk455qVlb5dtNv00JgAsoHxvxYzniTCBC4t4SOXCgdp6pMouiuEtR_JrAAYZZD8A%3D%3D)
BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white.

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive.

Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a _‘symbol of hatred’_ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, _“When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.”_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGa8ceNyTyWUZl5SPXK4U9myAsufPM6VEQ_YQLGOHGkHxCTfN5jpc2x25FB8QYR-lNZgxbLePB4u1Rn00SugAZwvkg3Rty8_eJjms3IHjsyzka26D9bHRRXrqVW_QC5TBeZHajA6cr_jc3sW4eeWXOhqx6MFk-4Nl47si2Y5j1RK5_B6LqXmIEjk3af-24IiFASfxdXb4MU06Zudxqq4_piQ%3D%3D)
I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women.

But the BLM organization uses _anything_ to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice.

[**We cannot allow them to take a symbol of freedom, the American flag, and turn it into a weapon for their agenda. We must stand up right now and fight back against their rhetoric.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGx3BTgaS9t9WVQlTnStTcrzbuyiVbqjN7Ii-i1IJIEc7-gO7QW6lKEw_BytEEUebp_x5duOTuU2Up8LGyQKsFCxMVczhH8MYNbVlF9R5zW4rbjMSVa6NzMTDNjDW7TZEhKGwHxbDHqrt0Bn3F_F8Z23NwCq7PhCEoNNhAM2fESWuTIVjJ6OIOjMEx0pLOsW03oSVj91Pyock8gKUZQg9cyw%3D%3D)

Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities.

[**Please, if you are in the position to give, help me deliver the truth about BLM and the Democrats to the entire nation. With your help, we can make meaningful change in Washington and elect a strong black conservative to end the Democrats’ racist Republican narrative.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGtEJGNAvFbsCIz0mcI0qtxXW8MW27bC0KjvO4i6GkrvIhE6etEhMNov8sp6EC179T8yIbIvSdbJRBsBl-PTlDQArQbeMuXKGlNvJ6oW2IOZsuFpujsddV8e1saysqwg1qwTBuy99Y3glxxbyHo1XVNJBnG8oedAYSCcdmuX4B3qg-hcsfvPMGxiTY9hfgkpBCe1mu3vgxlRYR5sjWBJFG3Q%3D%3D)

[**STAND UP TO BLM
ELECT A BLACK PATRIOT -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGbTdn3UW0X4ZOBMS7SRvddPRQAEe0QLbzVOM_oMRlh6mI8THWPLudHOO_i_5PZ3DJ7LAG_ljb59HiZhWnGyEC-L51R9czvOQi5fiFm2PkAJG9Oeeat4p6MRa931BVWk3pUAs2xRSl3brwvHj2etnDq4NFadF5UiLfzmkFmhdlHdku9oMtr3SixCce-CqzKxGDQRfcjpOz5SS_7Lv9wIcfmA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f09aa1de1b874e7aaa7f6ebaa41b54cb&_e=9prKwOF4ZCgM_la2m4azr8AQRTsjcWa5fElh4zsJj-24YjZptvBiGJ1Cy9rgrN8YdF-VG2doNoKAI71aTWNXdgbWFdox5EWCSQsx-GkMti7SAQ5xSfYC-pTB8VKDWaNIQrBKFb0hEMoksmTREdQlvW6FoQe3rppsRZZI8-ZSVE3bPZe8Cf8oK8FbLEX_GIjrCidxXJUeL44m-IH67JNG-4bP4dCMalOGtfAzM11Pu7A2j-XPA8HrhyQPX7-or6dGxASWSjK-8LQfn-p4_Nh4Xy4FRT2kxty7yA1Ts2dv8Fv1sl4bxTS_orRf4a36E5bCYj_wgk2u1GbowYb_jOrAdRWpJUNjj7TsP9GuuhS1P3Fr6fZ5YzDBIwpS2QyGav0QUbjoXsgy7JNPdHkdSNrNMTRKReDSt5nWMEk3eySeN2C-yBjxE676d2g3tHIgTUNnrm2S24mpL_fQPcw9hYyxkg%3D%3D)

The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | Peter, My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, let me tell you why. But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white. You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a ‘symbol of hatred’ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, “When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.” I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women. But the BLM organization uses anything to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice. Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
if we lose in New Hampshire | | |

Hi there -- I’m so grateful that I’m able to send you this email as a member of the Senate majority. Thanks to you, we put Joe Biden in the White House and pulled off a massive upset in Georgia, electing my colleagues Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to the Senate. Because Democrats have the majority, we’ve done critically important things like pass the American Rescue Plan which is putting vaccines in arms, letting small businesses reopen, helping families pay bills, and improving mental health services. I’m writing today because I want to continue to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I want to continue to serve in the majority. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and the Granite State’s Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. **If Democrats lose in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our narrow majority.** Because of this, Republicans like Mike Pence and Mitch McConnell are already rallying the GOP and spending big on attack ads smearing my record. clean_body: if we lose in New Hampshire | | | Hi there -- I’m so grateful that I’m able to send you this email as a member of the Senate majority. Thanks to you, we put Joe Biden in the White House and pulled off a massive upset in Georgia, electing my colleagues Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to the Senate. Because Democrats have the majority, we’ve done critically important things like pass the American Rescue Plan which is putting vaccines in arms, letting small businesses reopen, helping families pay bills, and improving mental health services. I’m writing today because I want to continue to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I want to continue to serve in the majority. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and the Granite State’s Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. If Democrats lose in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our narrow majority. Because of this, Republicans like Mike Pence and Mitch McConnell are already rallying the GOP and spending big on attack ads smearing my record. I hate asking you for money but my campaign desperately needs the funds to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for helping -- I appreciate it so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
