name: Monica De La Cruz Hernandez
subject: Democrats say the darndest things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Like the tweet last week that said freedom is for white people only. This is a prime example of why I'm running for Congress, and I could use your hel | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeKfuC44EIEXKp3oZhzQu8NTEucqJzQ5p6lgI5W_tdpcFgUxLJ5ZfbUwvk9F8w9ivcnJkvHJeOmdIHn7-1d4qg_1D6Fay-AQigtScY3mtCDdGQIO32UO1SHRzIPcVKnhpG9zDJHlnHrB9ou9g06k983QvGAmm-Vyk3EcOpyNj7FsW6puG63Kg0CWr68Dto7hLBYbdfYmDaiT1cWInXBx6fSk%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m a proud Hispanic woman running for Congress in Texas’ 15th congressional district. I’m a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud Republican. **Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from South Texas**.

I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world.

So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below.

I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border.**I was raised on the border. In my lifetime, I’ve seen hundreds of thousands - maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the United States.** Why? Because the United States is still the best hope for the world’s destitute and those who want to live in a nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of its collective self.

If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush’s, **[would you consider a gift to my campaign today of $50, $25 or even just $5?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeBKW3Oixl4S71T9ePFzHa1sTx5gDhSqiZKAjMA_nbzDuPS71CTMPcjLbdou2Yn_pz7F-4YJSgrBlRM2vqyb0QlLhy95Al_jxrxqtCwwfMfuq_eGjus86zt7NKpC41FKCXX-w2WrfShGDTSbVvRW4denwenPawi_fh5s7be1Aup8lpuYdmH6Ma-xkcxxUKKp2ZGG817OWaOnPGM24VxzUAsw%3D)**

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeBbuWcANK6CUgPuVyqLV-x7sVYoEibemau5KOtLKmXB0OBopJwrnZh0DjLygSZmDNCoGJz8Em8aMPgsOuzHSGPXbA2tas4MC4ibJmb-sFzJotbQmkqigYV3dcZj0vOHG3yXR2hJIKMczZXCyIE1NrgPOu0-KXzZ1opNzvPkShy0-5HmcAWD_QACFVypWmwQhH6hvNRqK7UB1bLU55t6X3hA%3D)
As a child of a single mother, I’m here to tell you that the American dream is alive and well, Fellow patriot. I can’t speak to the motives behind this woman’s tweet but I can tell you this: **words have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our democracy.**

If I’m fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet your bottom dollar that I won’t let words like Rep. Bush’s go unchecked. **[I’d march right down to the House floor and call her out for this crass lie that she’s pushing that America isn’t free](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeBk7lgxTWMxPtaWLZbKEXHFWvz_04hxF9emmpB-pTewlKJMlewpw-kNNaBM9-O6fojnHg1oxgKP12S9vfqN6JUG5zLmaKW2bVoXiVA1332LXPD-TpmkDLENlVFShOHjeX1OWB1y_V9jUU5ODIWG2hr5ryne02MwRBnXhDHCB6u8JtCRgsnlBRjKYySKOvWR-TvdVvtz2kY7UjRAijaNO8gY%3D)**.

If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to learn why - then here is her invitation.**I’m happy to translate for her. I think the response may surprise her**.

**I’ll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this**. Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race, or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. **It may not be easy and sometimes** , and it won’t be fair, but in this great nation and with God - **anything is possible**.

We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the American Dream. If you agree with that statement, **[I hope you’ll consider a gift to my campaign right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeBp-m79R68dZSEotcH18ck8A7AQhLT9YhY6N15A1AuzKp5RfdnF2kYmq54WD9P56yr0rDyZMhIQ8emSnCNl1vuMkpNoueL9t5sQCf7BCbedBaQ1Gg47eW4nU0roMpXQPIS-YSlHSe_oEpuNR4Fy5m1cX8fkXdlaCR6C5k8cLsQ1xlcEgX30GTeoGn0wcAeWNOkRInYqcHtWagQhSAsWoJrU%3D)**.

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19369542695a4ba7ae0df4280125d7fb&_e=RSoWK2UTqJG7-md6CV2oislB9ICimZlBDSo2lzuJH1cIQgz292RHXZtP9-8SWgvmeNfnzulABE_El8TssFG9yjzKYA5cOCH_nxbiXWaa-v-fFfKJ0hMVCpkVCcBMutGXKWWW7qblFO9zs-84Gi_5SbWH0RFBYVNt_RVSOwuWEE8FrMa9CrPsLuFXUBRtvzgMs8SnKJqL-7CVyxNPo5PUv1Z7aWATZ00-MEkHvTQNjhh2EdOaDc7Zg4uSZtuFUmQpElwM8SbtHfBiWIvTnAsZeIlg8CIMwFGeOj0f65v25FPW06Qj-5exgna05BBKc-2Q_L8Fel8_O0o13oBk7nTP6mXNCaPgow7hoXQ4lih7eaZoHd6p-J8Ix8Ky0f6PQTNVWporAiaQE0aymhnzFNe5RSZggYCVCdfzuPs-l-YHhIcHIeDakeBTsNtUbFkIdEHAsjchop-TKASydv_AhX2kzEwP-c1Hk6WlMOuTTBDf0ik%3D)

Thank you for your time

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Blank space
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're gonna literally cover a wall with the names of the online donors who make our campaign possible.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210712-1972-header&t=1&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)
Exciting news, Peter. **John approved our proposal to open the first official campaign office in Pittsburgh at the end of the summer!**
We don’t have all the details yet, but one thing is set in stone: We’re gonna turn part of the new office into a _huuuuuge_ Grassroots Donor Wall — a physical space covered with the names of people from all across the country who have contributed to our campaign.
**There’s space on our Donor Wall for Peter Willis right now, but we expect it will start filling up quickly...**
[**_To reserve your spot on our Grassroots Donor Wall before we open the first-ever John Fetterman for U.S. Senate campaign office, all you have to do is send a campaign contribution of $5 or more from today. What do you say?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22192?refcode=em20210712-1972&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22200?refcode=em20210712-1972&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210712%3Frefcode%3Dem20210712-1972&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)**
When anyone walks into our new office for the first time, we want to be able to showcase our campaign’s grassroots power and honor the individual people who have contributed to our campaign.
That's why **we're gonna reserve a wall in our Pittsburgh office and literally cover it with the names of the online donors who make our campaign possible** — real people, not corporate PACs or billionaire donors. It will be an IRL reminder of what, and who, John is fighting for.
[**_This opportunity will only last for a limited time, so don’t wait, Peter! Donate $5 right now to save a spot for your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall in our first-ever Pittsburgh campaign office._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22192?refcode=em20210712-1972&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22192?refcode=em20210712-1972&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)**
Keep watching this space,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210712-1972-footer&t=24&refcode2=1972_434096_87lwlr&akid=1972%2E434096%2E87lwlr)**

I need an OVERWHELMING surge of Democrats to spring into action, help me defend our Majorities, and STOP Republicans from buying their way back to power. I'm calling for 2,5OO gifts before midnight. Can I count on your $3? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFa38yGB~~)[PENDING

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)

\-- We can either let this one-term President rally his base, funnel cash to Republicans, and help usher in a total GOP takeover...

\-- Or we can band together, have a MASSIVE Democratic fundraising surge, and watch this Republican plot completely **COLLAPSE**.

There's no easy way to say this: ** | I need you to understand what's at stake in this moment: \-- We can either let this one-term President rally his base, funnel cash to Republicans, and help usher in a total GOP takeover... \-- Or we can band together, have a MASSIVE Democratic fundraising surge, and watch this Republican plot completely COLLAPSE. | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | ** Thank you, Nancy Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Time to go big on infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=P0jWCJItq5ZjQdGPKH3HCjsjViCYqzNs&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
The Biden administration has reached a compromise deal with Republicans on infrastructure. By itself, this compromise does not fully address the challenges facing our country. It must serve as a first step in a two-tiered infrastructure plan for us to achieve meaningful progress on the many weaknesses and vulnerabilities we face in our national infrastructure system. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why - and then join me in pushing for bolder action from Democrats.
Our country is facing an unprecedented moment of opportunity and challenge: Our planet is warming and natural disasters are proliferating to a dangerous degree; our investment in childcare, homecare, and education is disgracefully lacking; we have gross levels of inequality and an extreme depletion of affordable housing.
**Infrastructure legislation must invest in both _human_ as well as physical infrastructure to meet this extreme moment of climate crisis effectively. By itself, this compromise framework with Republicans does not do that. It is a start, but we must do more.**
Crucially, we cannot delay bold action - nor let Republicans run out the clock on Democrats' known period of control in Congress. Just think back to 2009 - when, at the beginning of the Obama presidency, Democrats had a majority in the House and a supermajority in the Senate. We spent many months seeking Republican support for President Obama's agenda, only to see them obstruct and delay and our Senate supermajority evaporate before the term ended - before we could pass our agenda.
Here's what I say to my colleagues: We didn't have the time to meander back then - and we don't have it now, either.
For the sake of our planet, for the sake of equality and prosperity for the American people, now is the time to go big and bold. **That 's why I'm asking 1,000 members of this team to sign my petition urging my Senate colleagues to __take__ that bold action. Can I count on your signature?**
**[Sign on now to urge the Senate to pass bold infrastructure investments to stop climate change and help everyday Americans prosper!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/infrastructure-2021?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1048-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1048-su-nd)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/infrastructure-2021?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1048-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1048-su-nd)
These are not pie-in-the-sky ideas. They are not a wish list. They are the policies that President Biden and countless Democrats ran on in 2020. They have been mandated by the American people, and Congress must heed the people's call.
I'll keep fighting for bold action that meets the urgency of this moment. Thanks for doing your part and fighting alongside me.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1048-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZKICXTN3%2BAKhEyaZSdqrHzsjViCYqzNs&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

**This kind of BS is the reason I’m running for Congress for the second time, Peter.**

If you weren’t aware, my opponent Peter DeFazio, is the chairman of the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. I think everyone can agree on the fact that America’s roads need to be fixed; everyone should have access to clean drinking water, and we shouldn’t be scared as to whether or not a bridge is going to collapse as use it to cross over a river.

But how many would agree that we need to spend our tax dollars on artwork for subways? _Well, apparently my opponent._

**Last week he nearly held up a $500 billion infrastructure bill in the House over funding for artwork in public transportation.** Yep, this is exactly what he said: _“If the Russians can have tilework and chandeliers, we can at least have a little artwork.”_

[**DONATE TODAY
RETIRE AN OUT-OF-TOUCH POLITICIAN-> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=001f40c2a3124813a68aa68fc5a8b70d&_e=CofNjNnSSD_kEXaDziwXqGoI9QqVRooVw2MPmOSq1Q7lN3p5LPDwguX4ClaphvAVEd7P6ejvkiGACi6w9KwXMcaikMMdUqF3GDZipdr2RehoK8-Z5XEYgtI0NXK0PUg9HPdYYQmCq6XnvKQNNUvPsAM8ThpbVMrSFlcLm8YSbq9cgWOe_dgv-0lR0URdm1-FmCOS3cSkqe6dBghNyZ1Ww1a3ZW7JwbNH52XptBCM54YlpmSbUZTJOanNJH0uA4ycLvb-YEAlo5fxZlKnEMhLeswjblQQYm0e2VDaQitQeVpw2Vp9ijVR5tZLi3GTJPRNbxBK87O-DRTGzrHeFnZacCzPSStmU42bj6o1RUoBVUYb4hOCZoCLe8AivwNk60sXO4H4dqps8cL6ER5qoHdR_1SkhmW7wSoa9Z1iZK5R0BqTZMUsSUdsTE0BZ-BLig_q)
I’ll be damned if this isn’t the perfect example of why I’m seeking a rematch against this man. It’s comical, really, that my opponent is steering our tax dollars toward buying artwork for a subway most of Americans will likely never ride!

This is as pure an example of swampy, inside Washington behavior if I’ve ever seen it.

[**Please consider a gift of $5, $10 or any amount you can afford today so we can send this man off to retirement.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=001f40c2a3124813a68aa68fc5a8b70d&_e=CofNjNnSSD_kEXaDziwXqGoI9QqVRooVw2MPmOSq1Q7lN3p5LPDwguX4ClaphvAVEd7P6ejvkiGACi6w9KwXMcaikMMdUqF3GDZipdr2RehoK8-Z5XEYgtI0NXK0PUg9HPdYYQmCq6XnvKQNNUvPsAM8ThpbVMrSFlcLm8YSbq9cgWOe_dgv-0lR0URdm1-FmCOS3cSkqe6dBghNyZ1Ww1a3ZW7JwbNH52XptBCM54YUPe9t7LSvQqZaMTVW-MRUf2u_c-arQV5EcDW2mk0pGEzL7ZAlXwXPxX_ilV6tl6qdszL2s1uhYxarKQDMt6_pJ2rOB0EzW639P10OCV3wXRUWmQbymP84DVWEGqP9EOrn1dS2xOakgt45AZPEmIkg4hD6zZZ6d4pvb85f0rMkl81M8B334X_QQNRHtI7qk5BYcguyTxpXprM3ybTh3PWG)

clean_body: This kind of BS is the reason I’m running for Congress for the second time. Last week my opponent nearly held up a $500 billion infrastructure | This kind of BS is the reason I’m running for Congress for the second time, Peter. If you weren’t aware, my opponent Peter DeFazio, is the chairman of the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. I think everyone can agree on the fact that America’s roads need to be fixed; everyone should have access to clean drinking water, and we shouldn’t be scared as to whether or not a bridge is going to collapse as use it to cross over a river. But how many would agree that we need to spend our tax dollars on artwork for subways? Well, apparently my opponent. Last week he nearly held up a $500 billion infrastructure bill in the House over funding for artwork in public transportation. Yep, this is exactly what he said: “If the Russians can have tilework and chandeliers, we can at least have a little artwork.” I’ll be damned if this isn’t the perfect example of why I’m seeking a rematch against this man. It’s comical, really, that my opponent is steering our tax dollars toward buying artwork for a subway most of Americans will likely never ride! This is as pure an example of swampy, inside Washington behavior if I’ve ever seen it. Sincerely, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Great America Update
subject: Frightening: happening now in America's schools
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c284%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=k%2fjAZeTe1FuzvdgdNH8XWw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4996%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yqdFhqUCF7s8IhsrW0tsYQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4997%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PLqtFYeIehfbfoYakyyaHg&sysid=1) Dear PragerU Supporter, Have you noticed what's happening in America's schools? The left has infiltrated K-12 education with destructive ideology like Critical Race Theory (CRT). It goes by many names...Anti-Racism, The 1619 Project, Black Lives Matter, Diversity/Equity/Inclusion... **CRT is intended to tear apart the very ideas that make America such a success --like being “colorblind” and treating everyone as individuals.** At PragerU, we realize that many families can’t pay for private schools that reflect their values or afford to quit their jobs to homeschool.**** Millions of parents want CRT out of schools but they lack the resources and solutions to fight. They have nowhere else to turn. **This is why PragerU rapidly created PragerU Kids.** [Support PragerU Kids Today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4998%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=paEsEh7LYfHOxG7AHd1QSg&sysid=1) PragerU Kids has developed original children’s programming that REPRESENTS YOUR VALUES while inoculating kids from this left-wing brainwashing. **We now offer books, magazines, and free kids shows that teach pro-American values to children of all ages.** PragerU Kids membership program--PragerU Resources for Educators and Parents (PREP)--is nearly 20,000 members strong! This grassroots volunteer army is mobilized to fight for our children and take action in cities and school boards across America. **Thanks to our donors’ early support, PragerU Kids’ efforts are already working...** “...Our Florida Catholic private school is not embracing the initial CRT-based program! So grateful for this group. Your support helped us do our homework, talk to other families, and meet with the school. We presented the facts and encouraged better alternatives. It is possible!!! Please do not give up...This group is amazing, and we wanted to thank you for inspiring us...” --Vitelio S. **PragerU Kids is only in its first full year. Imagine how much more PragerU Kids can do with your generous support. With enough funding, we’ll be able to produce and market even more original content, keep it free or at a very low cost for everyone, and activate Americans to fight CRT in their communities! ** [Support PragerU Kids Today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4998%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=paEsEh7LYfHOxG7AHd1QSg&sysid=1) PragerU Kids is the platform to advocate for YOUR values in K-12 education. [Please give a 100% tax-deductible donation today and become part of the solution.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4999%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iNqQ%2fM781GOHxkYuAnYVng&sysid=1) Thank you! Gratefully, Your PragerU Team | |
---

Thanks to our donors’ early support, PragerU Kids’ efforts are already working... “...Our Florida Catholic private school is not embracing the initial CRT-based program! So grateful for this group. Your support helped us do our homework, talk to other families, and meet with the school. We presented the facts and encouraged better alternatives. It is possible!!! Please do not give up...This group is amazing, and we wanted to thank you for inspiring us...” --Vitelio S. PragerU Kids is only in its first full year. Imagine how much more PragerU Kids can do with your generous support. With enough funding, we’ll be able to produce and market even more original content, keep it free or at a very low cost for everyone, and activate Americans to fight CRT in their communities! PragerU Kids is the platform to advocate for YOUR values in K-12 education. Thank you! Where do we draw the line, Friend? Leftist Democrats are fighting for the **RACIST** and**RADICAL** concept of**Critical Race Theory (CRT)** to be taught in our classrooms. _CRT teaches some children that they are inherently racist_ _yet others __that they are inherently oppressed._ **It indoctrinates them with the idea that their race has a larger impact on their future than their achievements or hard work. ** _This is a problem we_** _cannot_** _ignore._ **Our class structure is no longer one of oppressor and oppressed** , so why would we teach that structure to our students? **Teaching CRT in our classrooms will create an environment where students think their success is tied to their skin color.** This philosophy threatens to revert us back a hundred years! [**Keep CRT Out of Our name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I took on Scott Walker’s GOP machine and won -- twice. Now I'm running to replace Ron Johnson in the Senate, and I know we’ve got what it takes to win again. Can I count on your help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter, I know a thing or two about winning tough races because I've run two statewide campaigns before. Both times, I was up against Scott Walker’s Republican machine -- and both times, **I won with the help of a whole lot of folks like you.**

We won the campaign to save the State Treasurer's office with a supermajority. Then, we won again when I beat my GOP opponent by more than 100,000 votes to become Wisconsin’s fiscal watchdog. Those victories were _ours_ \-- and they happened because, together, we rolled up our sleeves, organized in every corner of the state, and got to work.

Now, it's time for our toughest race to date: **taking on Ron Johnson and flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue.** I can't win this thing alone. Peter, we’re going to have to roll up our sleeves again -- and make sure we’ve got the necessary resources to build another winning campaign. Can I count on your support?

[**If you want to give Ron Johnson the boot, add a donation of $5 or whatever you can to help fund our grassroots-powered campaign and fuel the tough work ahead. Your donations will allow us to go up against the likes of Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and all of Ron Johnson's special interest allies who’ve got his back in this race. Let’s go -- chip in right here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32293549/295309098/1714397553?gpsid=31_130_19620&refcode=em21_210712_tough_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210712_tough_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmYyNzE4MS01Y2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzymcH1vD3qYFzSqoN3X5lZTsTxTmlKPOAWBACytmsw=)

clean_body: Peter, I know a thing or two about winning tough races because I've run two statewide campaigns before. Both times, I was up against Scott Walker’s Republican machine -- and both times, I won with the help of a whole lot of folks like you. We won the campaign to save the State Treasurer's office with a supermajority. Then, we won again when I beat my GOP opponent by more than 100,000 votes to become Wisconsin’s fiscal watchdog. Those victories were ours \-- and they happened because, together, we rolled up our sleeves, organized in every corner of the state, and got to work. Now, it's time for our toughest race to date: taking on Ron Johnson and flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue. I can't win this thing alone. Peter, we’re going to have to roll up our sleeves again -- and make sure we’ve got the necessary resources to build another winning campaign. Can I count on your support? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = There's so much at stake in this election. | | Peter,
This is AZGOP Chairwoman, Dr. Kelli Ward. The full forensic audit of the Maricopa County 2020 General Election - aka, America's Audit - has now begun to inspire others. Legislators in Pennsylvania are grabbing the baton by calling for a forensic audit in their state as well. They even heaped praise for our efforts here in Arizona, saying that we **" really set the standards on a forensic analysis"** **-_everyone knows that our investigation here was thorough, complete, groundbreaking, and a monumental endeavor for_**** _Election Integrity!_** But that's also why the panicked Democrats and their media allies have been on a mission to try to discredit the effort - [_stand with us and show them we won 't back down!_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922716:J6PnUalN4:m:1:3253819041:B624F9C8B1B9F00D27F573D0D5E2A8A0:r)

---

That's why the AZGOP will _**_ALWAYS_** _take a stand for Election Integrity and voter confidence - **and we will always be grateful for your continued support as we protect the bedrock of our republic _together!_**

name: John Castorani
subject: Re: The Benghazi terror attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e653e2f1194343f9a086c215c5fc7adb&_t=w0xXmS0FrjPw5aPg9Lj7UDfouyiOntzwf7TBLtQ8NgSAjf61hJ15o02s3uHRiXb528wpuXryesDHK8baar9kzpu3PZCLQfyV6dhNZVWwZoe7-DJ8gjjeHKzzu-EsVcE3TVpRfAXEDxrZvGIXXF2LhUezQkGGOL2SA--I1ww2emA%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e653e2f1194343f9a086c215c5fc7adb&_e=K6sg7_hkVYbRjeTt5rEzYhoj9SEKs5RD_yfzvgi8OGzO1mQsP-xzusKxUCF2QOdZZs5j_Z2--cVyntHrW2l88__L7129D8e8DKOSWpCEJGsSyKeK9wsSQ3jVMY4uTC5Ik4KuB-KcvByy-i7p_-_PYXCjgByOa8uEeujPU9RB4UXA1Wq-2sr8ypna3WLQ7q_Mw4wf_JOCp4UIxDY58mr0jo1eWQVI5IVzrVVwhIS4gM16SsyK6-s9loLj4_UHYN7JQ50jM3j1U_gNEFnXDfh9ZsqBDZqo0Jvn4BKirvb6diVG091cA5JDsEcbs_UQqCRKiU9IuxYCqZiVTGlBRexoeWelF5ly8OGkXU5vMI5avUkvZJ9DwQ7EJaqZvdop-Qk6sK0HZR2YHrTOqSxneW0nULtr_jzYV3uqiKd1ykupdPlqIfL4I9CEzK7nIPTgOwf_on5YIsrhv7JNIup3fXCUrhHJsqKGyHkf59cHrdF_4B8%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e653e2f1194343f9a086c215c5fc7adb&_e=K6sg7_hkVYbRjeTt5rEzYhoj9SEKs5RD_yfzvgi8OGzO1mQsP-xzusKxUCF2QOdZZs5j_Z2--cVyntHrW2l88__L7129D8e8DKOSWpCEJGsSyKeK9wsSQ3jVMY4uTC5Ik4KuB-KcvByy-i7p_-_PYXCjgByOa8uEeujPU9RB4UXA1Wq-2sr8ypna3WLQ7q_Mw4wf_JOCp4UIxDY58mr0jo1eWQVI5IVzrVVwhIS4gM16SsyK6-s9loLj4_UHYN7JQ50jM3j1U_gNEFnXDfh9Zimih_37uAbtckGHC-cP-owfO0wsucn1yS2Q2nex_sKoCSEoabsojN9mucQdjtMCZhB8UH3htoguIV1BD1LuMANFIdTvHJ7RHmosAymdpC0kI4jlwcI73Itfiu-5huJ3rokVZwdqmjKzuVy9LZi4DHobHeq5p7b2L_WevBRDFueKrLp19hKDSQ3XKNADbHiEVOQQ9GH4aixg7i9Y7kNuNdo%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e653e2f1194343f9a086c215c5fc7adb&_e=K6sg7_hkVYbRjeTt5rEzYhoj9SEKs5RD_yfzvgi8OGzO1mQsP-xzusKxUCF2QOdZZs5j_Z2--cVyntHrW2l88__L7129D8e8DKOSWpCEJGsSyKeK9wsSQ3jVMY4uTC5Ik4KuB-KcvByy-i7p_-_PYXCjgByOa8uEeujPU9RB4UXA1Wq-2sr8ypna3WLQ7q_Mw4wf_JOCp4UIxDY58mr0jo1eWQVI5IVzrVVwhIS4gM16SsyK6-s9loLj4_UHYN7JQ50jM3j1U_gNEFnXDfh9ZpaBWHWT0FoWi4q3VwqQ1_3L4TASvBvxQXRGUNvhzxgYfqJshjECSdmWyl2Wf-aytb9iqRCUdkJOrVDlprLUQC8syQG4IpW1wQ05nR-GIXQodcJWabRYfFQLY7QZynz7_GAgNM2nP7ec-nZbltOZOw6wkc35dgVVKe52V-LE_jaZMK1GgI9wukeEvWa9gozftk6tkvpl0vsOZjPEgnoR2wU%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e653e2f1194343f9a086c215c5fc7adb&_e=K6sg7_hkVYbRjeTt5rEzYhoj9SEKs5RD_yfzvgi8OGzO1mQsP-xzusKxUCF2QOdZZs5j_Z2--cVyntHrW2l88__L7129D8e8DKOSWpCEJGsSyKeK9wsSQ3jVMY4uTC5Ik4KuB-KcvByy-i7p_-_PYXCjgByOa8uEeujPU9RB4UXA1Wq-2sr8ypna3WLQ7q_Mw4wf_JOCp4UIxDY58mr0jo1eWQVI5IVzrVVwhIS4gM16SsyK6-s9loLj4_UHYN7JQ50jM3j1U_gNEFnXDfh9ZhD10R3iGTG-iwPr-CozxU6v7gODkarEO950GADrUkPomIIDoygwphgVPE92mknO18fvx15kswduGs6FRStmjbC5XBguE7rOxOeKSoZls48McHj0Ndh3J2LqmFTjcBn3NG-v-uPCO5lE0ql0N-DEzR8OAiLV8hAn06vU_uOistI0JHQ1W894LhHOkf0J107y2gh2pS0QwjpLf4tz-UZLhJM%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_

Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32294295/295311452/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNiZDdmNi01ZWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-dh4zaUqrpT9pp0EE6Bk7dDMzhtLrgoO873jL7-CJU=&emci=cc36f1ec-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78cbd7f6-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

This pandemic has presented so many different challenges for parents. Whether it was adjusting to a remote working environment or finding a new job altogether, balancing work and home life was more demanding than ever.

As more schools reopen in the fall and America starts to return to normal, it has never been more clear that parents still need support -- and they need it _fast_.

Though the Child Tax Credit has existed since 1997, it's getting a major boost this year! Starting July 15th, 2021, millions of eligible parents will be receiving a monthly payment for up to $300 per month for each child under age 6 and up to $250 per month for each child ages 6 through 17.

But without further legislation, the Child Tax Credit will stop being an automatic payment to working families and revert back to its original form.

**Help us thank President Biden and Congress for putting money into the pockets of hard working California families and call on Congress to make it permanent.[Sign the petition now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32294296/295311453/-655475997?ms=em21_210712_childtaxcredit-s2&refcode=em21_210712_childtaxcredit-s2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNiZDdmNi01ZWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-dh4zaUqrpT9pp0EE6Bk7dDMzhtLrgoO873jL7-CJU=&emci=cc36f1ec-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78cbd7f6-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

And while the Child Tax Credit has been wildly popular for Americans across the country, Mike Garcia is unsurprisingly opposed to this policy which cuts childhood poverty in half.

Mike Garcia has a long history of bad votes on the House floor, but voting against the American Rescue Plan -- which included monthly payments for the Child Tax Credit -- takes the cake. **If he can't vote in favor of our working families here in California (along with money for vaccines), he has got to go.**

President Biden worked hard to make sure the American Rescue Plan gave every American the support they needed to get through the pandemic, but American families will continue to need our support long after the pandemic is over.

**[It's clear Mike Garcia won't be there for our families or for the Child Tax Credit -- so let's make sure it's loud and clear that _we_ support our families here in CA-25. Sign the petition to keep money in the pockets of those who need it most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32294297/295311454/-655475997?ms=em21_210712_childtaxcredit-s2&refcode=em21_210712_childtaxcredit-s2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNiZDdmNi01ZWUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-dh4zaUqrpT9pp0EE6Bk7dDMzhtLrgoO873jL7-CJU=&emci=cc36f1ec-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78cbd7f6-5ee3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)**

Thank you for always ensuring your voice is heard!

\-- Team Christy

clean_body: The records further show that, in 2018, Dr. Ping Chen, the NIAID Representative in China, learned of a “type of new flu vaccine using nano-technology from China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology” and discovered that the Chinese had blocked all Internet links to reports on the new technology. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 12, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The records further show that, in 2018, Dr. Ping Chen, the NIAID Representative in China, learned of a “type of new flu vaccine using nano-technology from China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology” and discovered that the Chinese had blocked all Internet links to reports on the new technology. This led Chen to write an urgent “night note” to US Government officials. The note said, “The intranasal nano-vaccine can target broad-spectrum flu viruses and induces robust immune responses.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information relating to the tracking and collecting of Americans’ social media posts through its Internet Covert Operations Program (iCOP). = ---|--- | | | | == | == A government office launched recently to eliminate racial disparities and achieve racial equity in Washington D.C. has determined that installing an Abraham Lincoln Spirit of Freedom Emancipation Statue at the African American Civil War Museum will widen racial inequity even though the council unanimously voted for it and the mayor supports it. In fact, Mayor Muriel Bowser urged the D.C. Council to pass the resolution, known as PR 24-0238, approving the statue’s installation on the public space adjacent to the museum in the historic Archibald Grimke School at 1925 Vermont Avenue, NW. == ---|--- | | | | == | == On March 4, 2007, Galvin and 29 members of the Marine Special Operations Company Foxtrot (Fox Company), the first combat unit of the U.S. Marine Corps Forces Special Operations Command (MARSOC), passed through the Afghan village of Bati Kot, near the Pakistan border, in a six-vehicle convoy. A suicide bomber driving a fuel and explosive-packed van approached the convoy at a high rate of speed. The van detonated, then fighters on both sides of the road opened fire on the convoy. == ---|--- | | | == The Epoch Times Two high-profile conservative legal activists claim the Department of Justice (DOJ) is using a double standard in its treatment of those detained regarding the Jan. 6 breach of the Capitol, compared to those who were arrested during the rioting following the death of George Floyd in Minneapolis in 2020. More than 500 individuals have been arrested by federal authorities and charged with multiple serious offenses in connection with the events of Jan. 6, 2021, dozens of whom remain in jail awaiting trial. == == The Epoch Times The Washington, D.C.-based government watchdog filed its suit after the FBI failed to respond as required by federal law to the group’s Feb. 10, 2021, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for: “All records of communication between the FBI and any financial institution, including but not limited to Bank of America, Citibank, Chase Manhattan Bank, Discover, and/or American Express, in which the FBI sought transaction data for those financial institutions’ debit and credit card account holders who made purchases in Washington, DC, Maryland and/or Virginia on January 5, 2021, and/or January 6, 2021.” == == Breitbart Our country cannot pursue racial unity and inclusion through promoting disunity and exclusion. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Standing Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

It was an honor to have the opportunity this past Saturday to see so many friends, neighbors and family members at our grassroots kickoff. We were proud to welcome the more than 250 attendees that included grassroots activists, local elected officials and precinct chairs to join us in our effort to return conservative representation back to west Houston.

This display of support was proof of what you and I already know, that Texans are fed up with what we are seeing in Washington. The Biden Administration’s attempts to undermine our values and end our way of life are meeting resounding opposition right here.

I am proud to stand with so many of my fellow patriots to fight for a more secure border, safer communities, and a strong and energy independent America.

Together, I know that there is nothing that can stop us.

Sincerely,
Wesley

name: Monica De La Cruz Hernandez
subject: Democrats say the darndest things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Like the tweet last week that said freedom is for white people only. This is a prime example of why I'm running for Congress, and I could use your | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5050353af014000aae63e6e97383d3b&_e=aNqA5S-UC689ZHP9FnyEv145qasKuQCQj3b8wTtQfQf2yFJ7E4i2AjJSB1F25Z6ZjHpP4GyMCCVMAc6HclZFMcvzYUy6jusF7zzswsbSiC4ekUfIE4KHTEM5Zkv8FVsRW6RpM1Xy36BwcnalhoRbO46R-vv6TpER_QfHRYao_aXTZBLkOY2ZEIwgSFJw1ePJaMEaKTUQS4xW-8Gqj41yAe3zvApp_Zt6_wfRUQUZRQX1mxhFOkgNQqaRQ2blETIQCaG-lT5PBgjEjZi84hPqzI_JvvabIN0e8_Omj6uI92tKOmk7QR6GA0NgSV4W7iT6VRJBTiUu0SZcW2PoRcU5F1M5uaeFjsNmwAH03YCQbOtwIESoL7q_woFA-hzYlbH1m2oUNfPfphcXvfP743egy9sb2gkSCPxxX0TDcMXDXXHPlkyM1t6I542wSFX50Xjgg0tBqT9bj_XegzOtJ9wcZtGTm9gvEaWEOO93BC4kZGM%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m a proud Hispanic woman running for Congress in Texas’ 15th congressional district. I’m a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud Republican. **Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from South Texas**.

I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world.

So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below.

I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border.**I was raised on the border. In my lifetime, I’ve seen hundreds of thousands - maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the United States.** Why? Because the United States is still the best hope for the world’s destitute and those who want to live in a nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of its collective self.

If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush’s, **[would you consider a gift to my campaign today of $50, $25 or even just $5?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5050353af014000aae63e6e97383d3b&_e=aNqA5S-UC689ZHP9FnyEv145qasKuQCQj3b8wTtQfQf2yFJ7E4i2AjJSB1F25Z6ZjHpP4GyMCCVMAc6HclZFMcvzYUy6jusF7zzswsbSiC4ekUfIE4KHTEM5Zkv8FVsRW6RpM1Xy36BwcnalhoRbO46R-vv6TpER_QfHRYao_aXTZBLkOY2ZEIwgSFJw1ePJaMEaKTUQS4xW-8Gqj41yAe3zvApp_Zt6_wfRUQUZRQX1mxhFOkgNQqaRQ2blETIQCaG-lT5PBgjEjZi84hPqzKCtu5AQ05MnjoK0yiM8XRZiKZga_H_uTjt1HSj-griNdEOJJKCFmFAyXrsy-MHBMEt9_pEzClSQhe6bk4AlrYDEQnkmbPJMDN5PwMKKoXHBtVLHyhxVyWmyiXWhehDY0npvsANa0wXVs0cZ3RMeHkcPqU8JApO3LQVqdhxJMJKoAsdRlUViaoLQvmb1nUoYFugjkHPbTR06Fa9uT623R-4%3D)**

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5050353af014000aae63e6e97383d3b&_e=aNqA5S-UC689ZHP9FnyEv145qasKuQCQj3b8wTtQfQf2yFJ7E4i2AjJSB1F25Z6ZjHpP4GyMCCVMAc6HclZFMcvzYUy6jusF7zzswsbSiC4ekUfIE4KHTEM5Zkv8FVsRW6RpM1Xy36BwcnalhoRbO46R-vv6TpER_QfHRYao_aXTZBLkOY2ZEIwgSFJw1ePJaMEaKTUQS4xW-8Gqj41yAe3zvApp_Zt6_wfRUQUZRQX1mxhFOkgNQqaRQ2blETIQCaG-lT5PBgjEjZi84hPqzOXKRBJVn2YplIrOP93bP4sgbLi7-Z7mBT4gHw9R_BFL8IarC2-_x5CRaRwqCiCCTrVEu6rdswnC8_5Y9Pxw-__Fh2a_g4F2tn4m3V9A_OGz_EGtkIrD7taGnbpOupFO6z6TYTfgycta7c5GNnZBPI9Ezi9x-1CPDbcAoWKxW82VFsQJye77lf2-ECuMwM-m33TC2oX6d30P3snrCavRGO8%3D)
As a child of a single mother, I’m here to tell you that the American dream is alive and well, Fellow patriot. I can’t speak to the motives behind this woman’s tweet but I can tell you this: **words have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our democracy.**

If I’m fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet your bottom dollar that I won’t let words like Rep. Bush’s go unchecked. **[I’d march right down to the House floor and call her out for this crass lie that she’s pushing that America isn’t free](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5050353af014000aae63e6e97383d3b&_e=aNqA5S-UC689ZHP9FnyEv145qasKuQCQj3b8wTtQfQf2yFJ7E4i2AjJSB1F25Z6ZjHpP4GyMCCVMAc6HclZFMcvzYUy6jusF7zzswsbSiC4ekUfIE4KHTEM5Zkv8FVsRW6RpM1Xy36BwcnalhoRbO46R-vv6TpER_QfHRYao_aXTZBLkOY2ZEIwgSFJw1ePJaMEaKTUQS4xW-8Gqj41yAe3zvApp_Zt6_wfRUQUZRQX1mxhFOkgNQqaRQ2blETIQCaG-lT5PBgjEjZi84hPqzOL7r1gjq9fFR6F90Ff0cvAFpGMsoLyqK6k9eIM2gYiPFAQDYAnN49VPdlpyPN1CMu0-Pf_gUiDlyUQucKbGaF__-QNIa0weO_XW1H1SkCHmy3n9Fw8L__vYFtOSOOvAPVozTpRFI7WnAnlrJBMPkUGHlcZf-gdOVKIsLyprJHi8A0LhWBOLZhv-NLGRbaovUjWEzc3-Na9u3aYAEtrYTfM%3D)**.

If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to learn why - then here is her invitation.**I’m happy to translate for her. I think the response may surprise her**.

**I’ll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this**. Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race, or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. **It may not be easy and sometimes** , and it won’t be fair, but in this great nation and with God - **anything is possible**.

We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the American Dream. If you agree with that statement, **[I hope you’ll consider a gift to my campaign right now](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5050353af014000aae63e6e97383d3b&_e=aNqA5S-UC689ZHP9FnyEv145qasKuQCQj3b8wTtQfQf2yFJ7E4i2AjJSB1F25Z6ZjHpP4GyMCCVMAc6HclZFMcvzYUy6jusF7zzswsbSiC4ekUfIE4KHTEM5Zkv8FVsRW6RpM1Xy36BwcnalhoRbO46R-vv6TpER_QfHRYao_aXTZBLkOY2ZEIwgSFJw1ePJaMEaKTUQS4xW-8Gqj41yAe3zvApp_Zt6_wfRUQUZRQX1mxhFOkgNQqaRQ2blETIQCaG-lT5PBgjEjZi84hPqzBhpJwc8bM7C7FCoG1n_6_5Yl9DwLFE5VciVtyJmtbzca8SZW1p0BCxxIT_uN5yJOTHim3K607xcQ3ftXSk7e45jhvXloHuShTdoElYsuIpOeS3fH_XQCEx6dYKlRAW2MUJ3G-x-Bb8t-GgZhg_GNDnVNgLpYIkuxFQ7D4Fod14rPu6d9mNmkUx1wYy9kbdLVRItLgVb4QOR1E8_9IcrEBQ%3D)**.

clean_body: Like the tweet last week that said freedom is for white people only. This is a prime example of why I'm running for Congress, and I could use your | Fellow patriot, My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m a proud Hispanic woman running for Congress in Texas’ 15th congressional district. I’m a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud Republican. Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from South Texas. I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world. So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below. I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border.I was raised on the border. In my lifetime, I’ve seen hundreds of thousands - maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the United States. Why? Because the United States is still the best hope for the world’s destitute and those who want to live in a nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of its collective self. If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush’s, As a child of a single mother, I’m here to tell you that the American dream is alive and well, Fellow patriot. I can’t speak to the motives behind this woman’s tweet but I can tell you this: words have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our democracy. If I’m fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet your bottom dollar that I won’t let words like Rep. Bush’s go unchecked. . If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to learn why - then here is her invitation.I’m happy to translate for her. I think the response may surprise her. I’ll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this. Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race, or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. It may not be easy and sometimes , and it won’t be fair, but in this great nation and with God - anything is possible. We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the American Dream. If you agree with that statement, . Thank you for your time Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

subject: I’m not mad Peter I’m just disappointed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please let us know that you're okay

Peter, Trump gave an OUTSTANDING SPEECH at CPAC yesterday! He knocked it out of the park... per usual.

It's always fantastic to see the greatest President taking the stage. **But it didn 't help that you IGNORED our repeated requests to stand alongside Donald Trump and House Conservatives. **

_Peter, we're not mad...just disappointed. We really thought that you would want to give back to the leader who has given so much to you ..._

[**Here 's one final chance. If you still care about this country, President Trump, and House Conservatives, please chip in whatever you can in the next hour so Trump knows you still care.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922858:6d7J0al0N:m:1:3253819041:E4D0FDB34AA24FEC626D929476D02705:r)

Peter, this is serious. Leadership has asked us to check in on you several times, and you still haven't responded to us. [**Please let us know that you 're okay>>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922858:6d7J0al0N:m:1:3253819041:E4D0FDB34AA24FEC626D929476D02705:r)

This country won't get any better unless Patriots like you act. And it's clear: [**there isn 't a better time to stand up and do your part than right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922858:6d7J0al0N:m:1:3253819041:E4D0FDB34AA24FEC626D929476D02705:r)

Thank you,

House Conservatives

[**P.S. Trump has teased that he may run for President again if we take back the House. If that sounds exciting to you, please chip in a donation in the next hour to show Trump you 're one of his Top Patriots!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922858:6d7J0al0N:m:1:3253819041:E4D0FDB34AA24FEC626D929476D02705:r)

name: CA-22 UPDATE (via campaign@tonycardenas.com)
subject: re: Devin Nunes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| Peter, Devin Nunes is _**_one of the WORST MAGA Republicans_**_ California has to offer!

He spews outlandish conspiracy theories and abuses his power to do Donald Trump’s bidding.

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Peter, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ _e pluribus unum_ ” – out of many, one.

But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist. How absurd. Peter, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students. Please take a moment to let us know: | POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: Monday, July 12th Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal? The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ e pluribus unum ” – out of many, one. This is what the Left does, Peter, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America. . Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

clean_body: You’re receiving this email because you’ve expressed interest in defending and expanding our Democratic Senate majority. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click. | | Well, McConnell is at it again. He just announced the plan for 2022... How are they gonna do it? Wealthy GOP donors are already gearing up to spend millions (maybe more) to ensure that Democrats lose our razor-thin majority in the Senate. We cannot let that happen. The mission of the Battlefield Expansion Project is to defend and expand the Democratic Senate majority by going on offense and flipping battleground states from red to blue. But first we want your input on where to start. Friends, you’ve been selected to help us craft the strategy for 2022. Which battleground should Democrats focus our efforts on? | This election will be our toughest yet and losing our Senate majority is a very real possibility— that’s why we need a grassroots movement that rivals the ones we built to support Mark Kelly and Georgia Democrats in 2020. Respond right away! We need to know: Where can we win? Thank you for participating today. Our Democratic movement relies on voters like you taking action. Data & Strategy 2022 Team Battlefield Expansion Project | | | = | The Battlefield Expansion Project has one mission: provide early and ongoing support to Senate candidates in states where Democrats can play offense in 2022 — Iowa, Ohio, Wisconsin, and more. We're bringing the fight to Republicans and making them sweat in places they're usually comfortable. Join us by =. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by the Battlefield Expansion Project Battlefield Expansion Project 4304 Evergreen Lane Annandale, VA 22003 United States

name: Monica Hernandez De La Cruz
subject: You've simply got to read this racist tweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Cori Bush, a member of the "Squad" seems to think that American freedom is only for white people. I need your help to teach her a lesson | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum_QCmMc8KlwhznKWMDp-jfUsH-445UEMRYd3uqKhgkWQpHNxbSnZj0GSOUIoNe-HZmbgV2zrOEqiUyl_j2z2FwiGVBwQ_Iz59Ole24FknFq-XgJ3L6issarrQawYtG6I0PJu8KArznBmbrcI9LHLVK8eTnJsT96OwXFnLoXSQu6Qfg2khlmxiHB6vO8dj1r5bT-I7cTeM0MEIUpr1CZjfhL)
---
Fellow patriot,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m a proud Hispanic woman running for Congress in Texas’ 15th congressional district. I’m a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud Republican. **Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from South Texas**.

I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world.

So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below.

I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border.**I was raised on the border. In my lifetime, I’ve seen hundreds of thousands - maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the United States.** Why? Because the United States is still the best hope for the world’s destitute and those who want to live in a nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of its collective self.

If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush’s, **[would you consider a gift to my campaign today of $50, $25 or even just $5?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum_l0PmfdutJ9z3xxqvmnpAM5jfqlfQgGl1fT4EIoTGEu6xrbfRMagdJb8F-njT2sMXAcs0aszDMsAQYbp9ZUcORUZ7jPefHyWe-FFCcNG2aENj9QUhIWiQpnkPgy6pVYclnmbWhgPiz9x25KLwdTAlwt3AgLTjyimOZgGGJM2Jm1RWvbUVsaKkvEdu412o4ueMiVswqiwCG2fwUQWOoi5Cz)**

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum_FrXjOBVhdmccgr-lD3urxxNki47oX5jL8OL3XWsV26X9G0NvZgWtoL6qYEoP3ZfuL2HzFIN-1cvXrGej0fhAJS8fuq-HNqrET47Mi9QFZbukvfV2yl17RE4I1s_B-cPO3MwjXc6umVQ-Phpy2iYmR_py-3UfmUsAky5sRnI3UPWNGPZeD3vr2SibOj3GlhYTjJUVssj7Z2kVObJERpcKX)
As a child of a single mother, I’m here to tell you that the American dream is alive and well, Fellow patriot. I can’t speak to the motives behind this woman’s tweet but I can tell you this: **words have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our democracy.**

If I’m fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet your bottom dollar that I won’t let words like Rep. Bush’s go unchecked. **[I’d march right down to the House floor and call her out for this crass lie that she’s pushing that America isn’t free](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum-hNw9GPVxoBVBLIQRliBJ6m7qPUBH1_h7wxZzQieqQPm9NgHW-kxOWWiTQ6Mh72qaVf09v7sx0FhyvujRCQaNiU6TaB-4FZLrjLABUXgEk3K7_lrsoBoP7jY16-fueqp_zQG5FA8luqMRa1VJsq25hxlEWlEmK3M-pTVTD6F-Qf_s-SpQiRYtpXcWKi6sasjZlIJTeUvlIzCpFHPRbG216)**.

If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to learn why - then here is her invitation.**I’m happy to translate for her. I think the response may surprise her**.

**I’ll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this**. Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race, or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. **It may not be easy and sometimes** , and it won’t be fair, but in this great nation and with God - **anything is possible**.

We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the American Dream. If you agree with that statement, **[I hope you’ll consider a gift to my campaign right now](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum9fA7xmOqOvSP7C8hnIPKixEQ8m17ql6jJijtIW0CuyPPU1t--TlYcFczIk97x6DdJn5OFphIXLf6UF7qfz_SJ0ZMD_AG10I4bcZPHicRyxdw2Ei7AkWN28HyzhrBhnp_nLlof7P5-CjFl68tGtnsVb4ca8IHOW5DtKvCDdJDuSaB1htUPtLPIEMktK_eqR-Pfez0SscnRoQnOoZ3aFyzbf)**.

[ MAKE A GIFT TODAY
SEND A HISPANIC REPUBLICAN TO CONGRESS ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ab4188d63ad9492490a4f796d6df2346&_e=191BYfuaFIOmDhpLwhND85YmDd2ywxKy8HhOcz0z2SGfVFgN3sPToa0s4K2DQyLzIbRloaOJjGwt4GnkjKosxcMH6NxADISnQ0S1jpUwkat713y0FVJz1sbhhHD8xKBJbDbKZsE7QeL3YmBUl8fUfC2yP-awlMSUiTxEu9Jv8FGf9dzKynodiPPVVx1--xjV4D9vCBWIgykA8ss0nSpmzvaxCpeLU8TfJzvVzoiDbOMGdURCFfgvgAWME6G-ou8jOIKBSYDxnfnrjKweyg-eloBZ2COKtuHg9e0OBiORum9kXFN-JWOt7rgwy27y4uZcIPBDaLjl75SJ_-JwyVHeJAyxG6a1oOP14QcDSiBqLCGNiOrHt43-cJX83c-0JQ8jVah5UIqb-7_aoVj614v11gNZi-I3_yt4XFlaSUwEnoqDknAHIL3zO1mvkRe-I7SeghiS0x292paQpeDoSJ_mGhBPAstaEUBB3chyoUK4BADQKZEoXR4BiEVUDnhsuZ4q)

Thank you for your time

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

| | Don't miss these two great events with Congressman Jim Banks and Congressman Devin Nunes on Saturday, July 24th in Fort Wayne.

The first event of the day is the next stop on Congressman Nunes’ Freedom Tour with special guests Congressman Jim Banks and WOWO’s own Pat Miller and Kayla Blakeslee

This is a free event but you MUST register to attend. Please register at this link: **https://www.eventbrite.com/e/devin-nunes-freedom-tour-fort-wayne-in-tickets-162370736243**

The second event of the day is a reception supporting Congressman Banks featuring Congressman Nunes as a special guest. You can find further information about this event below. Please RSVP to me and I'll provide the venue information.

We would love to see you at either or both events! Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Landon Porter

---

Peter,

Critical race theory is divisive down to its very core.

It's a movement that seeks to indoctrinate our children, rewrite history, and spit in the face of civil rights.

There's no place for it in our classrooms, our military, or our government - and I'm not going to stop saying that anytime soon.
[**I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922316:6VdcjPlrN:m:1:3253819041:22BC0ADC6B38F73523D47F07A6DC8ABE:r)
The Biden-Harris administration has embraced this out-of-touch philosophy because they've been completely overrun by the radicals within their party.

You thought the Green New Deal was bad? Or maybe that 1 year+ of lockdowns would be the worst of it?

The truth is - that was only the beginning.

_The radical left wants to divide every American, replace every institution, and rebuild our nation to resemble the "socialist utopia" hellscape they've always wanted._

Putting an end to Critical Race Theory is just one step in stopping their destructive plans.

As a Senator, I have the chance to stand up to the bureaucrats implementing critical race theory, but I need your help to show our strength against this radicalism. Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?

You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2563203/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922316:6VdcjPlrN:m:1:3253819041:22BC0ADC6B38F73523D47F07A6DC8ABE:r)**

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Bezos, Bloomberg, Buffett, and billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
A fundamental problem in our society.
#
Peter,
Jeff Bezos made $8.4 billion in just one day last week. Let’s compare that to what working families make: the median daily earnings in this country is around $150.
But it’s not just Bezos making astronomically more than workers. It’s Bloomberg, Buffett, and the billionaires who run the biggest corporations.
**So, I must say it again: It’s time to tax the rich.** That’s why my friend Elizabeth Warren and I introduced a wealth tax that would tax those with net worths over $50 million — that’s the top 0.05% of households — so the ultra-wealthy finally start paying their fair share.
[**This is a fight for economic justice, for leveling the playing field, and for creating a country that puts working people first. It’s a fight I need you all in for, because we know powerful interests will be fighting this modest tax increase on the richest Americans. Donate $3 today to help us pass the wealth tax.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210712?refcode=em20210712-456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=456_420207_M7l2F6&akid=456%2E420207%2EM7l2F6)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210712?refcode=em20210712-456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=456_420207_M7l2F6&akid=456%2E420207%2EM7l2F6)**
**This pandemic crushed working people.** One in seven families didn’t have enough to eat. More than eight million people were pushed into poverty. Historic levels of job loss have also led to millions of people losing their health care — during a public health crisis! **All while Jeff Bezos and other billionaires continued to grow their fortune.**
Last year, Bezos paid less than 1% in federal taxes — compare that to the average household paying 14% in federal taxes. That’s why our wealth tax is so important. While leveling the playing field, taxing the rich would also bring in three trillion dollars. Just imagine what we could do with three trillion dollars. That’s COVID relief, health care, infrastructure, child care, education, fighting climate change, affordable housing, and so much more.
**[We cannot wait any longer. Join me in this fight to tax the rich and fund the programs working people need with a $3 donation right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210712?refcode=em20210712-456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=456_420207_M7l2F6&akid=456%2E420207%2EM7l2F6) _Your donation helps us fight back against the corporate interests trying to stop our Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act._**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210712?refcode=em20210712-456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=456_420207_M7l2F6&akid=456%2E420207%2EM7l2F6)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210712-456-footer&t=23&refcode2=456_420207_M7l2F6&akid=456%2E420207%2EM7l2F6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922345:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57922346:6lmvNPlsN:m:1:3253819041:28EF3A41C1E40CEC94EE67F98CDBC4A5:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

Hey Peter,

Right now, I’m preparing to return to Congress for a very important legislative session that will last several weeks.

**My colleagues and I will be working hard to pass two of our most important progressive priorities: infrastructure and voting rights.**

With razor thin majorities and a GOP dead-set on obstruction, this will be no easy fight.

At the same time, the GOP is working around the clock to campaign against us and steal our majorities!!

**Unfortunately, this upcoming legislative session means I won’t be able to spend as much time fundraising to protect my seat.**
