Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Senator Klobuchar is RIGHT. So we’re launching a new petition to support her bill and STOP robocall scammers once and for all. | [We need [41] more signatures from Pennsylvania or we won’t be on track to hit our goal!]() Robocall scammers must be held accountable: \-- They people unwanted messages day after day, week after week \-- They your area code to trick you into answering your phone \-- They sensitive credit card and Social Security information \-- And they on elderly and vulnerable people! These vicious scammers target more than 300 million people EVERY SINGLE DAY! Amy Klobuchar and our Democrats in Congress have the power to STOP robocalls in their tracks, but we need your help. Let's get it done, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Peter,

_We have less than 48 hours to raise $2,500 to hit our fundraising goal._ If we miss this goal, every NeverTrump and Leftist Super PAC will see it and will pour millions to defeat me.

subject: Fight Big Tech With Us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Trump is Fighting |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8a292ed072&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

After years of conservatives complaining about the tyranny and censorship of Big Tech, President Trump is fighting back- and he needs allies! [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=3046cf4d81&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- including Big Tech.

I'm so glad someone is finally doing something about these out of control Leftist Big Tech corporations. I'm not surprised at all that it's President Trump!

_"In effect, Big Tech has been illegally deputized as the censorship arm of the U.S. government," Trump wrote.

Trump said that his lawsuit argues that "Big Tech companies are being used to impose illegal and unconstitutional government censorship," which he claims is occurring due to Democrats in Congress being able to "coerce platforms into censoring their political opponents."

The former president said that Congress has pressured Big Tech CEOs to censor false stories and disinformation, which they do using "an army of partisan fact-checkers loyal to the Democrat Party."_

What the Tech cartel is doing is insane. [It will be stopped](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9537742b34&e=ba6e67b849). But what I'm seeing is too little support in Congress to rein in Big Tech and its collusion- even among Republicans!
---
|
---
| _House Republicans have been flamboyantly waving the anti-Big-Tech banner with increasing passion and aggression, often in response to growing online censorship. Virtually every television appearance or in-district rally by a House Republican entails righteous denunciations of Silicon Valley monopoly power. Yet none of the Committee Republicans was willing to sign onto or support the Cicilline report.

In sum, there was a huge gap between GOP rhetoric about the evils of Big Tech and the actions of House Republicans, which not only failed to follow through on their fiery language but oftentimes seemed devoted to protecting the interests of the very Silicon Valley giants they were publicly denouncing. _

I'm tired of Republicans who say one thing and do another. _Trump is fighting Big Tech, and we need Republicans in Congress willing to help him!_

The RINOs love to tell us what we want to hear at Election time- only to break our hearts the next year. This Big Tech issue is a great example of this.

We will support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump's efforts to rein in Big Tech! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial to holding them accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ae5db3ebfb&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates conservatives. They like their closed door, elite mentality. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b8b36cfa67&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=5f323f9c09&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. We must defeat these enemies of the Republic!! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=c4eac7b15d&e=ba6e67b849)

| **From the Desk of Mike Pompeo**
70th Secretary of State
* * *
The radical Left is mocking us, and I won't stand for it.

As President Trump's Secretary of State, I made America more prosperous and much stronger. I worked to protect and honor our American values. Now, only 6 months after taking office, the Biden Administration is laughing at us as they destroy all of the progress we made.

I am sick and tired of the radical Left thinking they can mock us for supporting the very values that make America great. The truth is the Democrats are scared of losing power to those of us who are true to the foundational principles that set America apart from the rest of the world.

With my group - CAVPAC - we are focused 100% on championing American values. I have been blown away by the overwhelming support from strong conservatives from every corner of the country, but our fight is far from over.

**[That is why I'm calling on you to join me in standing up against the radical Left.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e0ea33b9a4ff4f32a6b01483e3ccc605&_e=yoDjcWr0lXXHC6NQVNQ8XKsn4XjuNdTCdsM_R0oA10cjqvHxEl7B3mHVUhHl8EJ9xX5NDOVYTHjMLNT9RPFPyDN7dvU3wT39Qqtl-slMF5dZ_BfVBIbQn_9JJltjnS6yB7-e0T-iH-LEP0eFEvFM6VarFnpxQ33f7cW_yqLfbM_N1bXjQvaZ1MIeDTs17AZA6q9FTviE7ct5Wg1qUXZC2al82FkCm9xNDGxUBrbjD75KFEnncGTmny25wMuGNEubvxXQNUKM0vXZK7zMo6K0vTcRYWjYRs3x4XdZdoZHdxmXSjBYCfnALeD-okppCkG8A07tegMaWclmjicqObKpHmvNLePimbD4su6degeX_yhqYIuQhzeTkPGkIYFfrU_eUim8mfKT_8J-zEW6xrj1-_07W9WZSuJ9DJoGIcMhx9FHFpymp9uhmynnXIOtNxioqSOnoCZCiWZVRLqArdMvM4uWzgtqB12sQ6xk6pZzjNB2GQDlOW6EG7vGIUGlHQ43 "That is why I’m calling on you to join me in standing up against the radical Left. Friend,

We are coming up on our monthly fundraising goal, and we still have a long way to go.

Our finance team has put together some helpful information for you:
* Mike’s average campaign online contribution is only $33.
* If everyone receiving this email donated just $1, we would exceed our goal by over $14,000.

**Here’s why this $33 is an important number:** It means our campaign isn’t fueled by elite “mega donors” like the Democrats. Instead, our fundraising efforts rely on **grassroots supporters like you** who chip in a little bit at a time.

clean_body: We put together some helpful info for you | Friend, We are coming up on our monthly fundraising goal, and we still have a long way to go. Our finance team has put together some helpful information for you: Mike’s average campaign online contribution is only $33. If everyone receiving this email donated just $1, we would exceed our goal by over $14,000. Here’s why this $33 is an important number: It means our campaign isn’t fueled by elite “mega donors” like the Democrats. Instead, our fundraising efforts rely on grassroots supporters like you who chip in a little bit at a time. When we say every dollar makes a difference,we really mean it. | Grassroots support is what fuels our campaign -- we really couldn’t do it without you. Thank you for all of your help and support, Grace, Braun Finance Team Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?
